content: A dreamy East Asian ink-and-watercolor fantasy illustration of a woman's side-profile silhouette merged with a vast mountain landscape, in a vertical poster composition. Her flowing dark hair expands outward like swirling brushstrokes and mist, transforming into mountain ridges, clouds, and ornamental ink curls. Inside the silhouette and hair, depict an intricate classical Chinese shanshui world with layered blue-green peaks, soft waterfalls, drifting fog, and exactly 4 traditional pagodas nestled among the cliffs. Include exactly 4 white cranes flying through the upper left and center sky. Add blooming cherry blossom branches with pink flowers in exactly 5 main clusters distributed through the hair, shoulder, and lower body, with loose petals floating across the scene. Near the lower middle, place a single arched stone bridge over a calm river, and under it a tiny wooden boat with 1 lone figure. Use a warm golden sunlit sky on the upper right with pale peach and cream parchment tones, contrasting with cool teal, slate blue, and ink-black mountains. The woman's profile should face right, elegant and serene, with no facial details except the clean contour of forehead, nose, lips, neck, and shoulder. The overall style should feel like {argument name="art style" default="ethereal Chinese ink wash and watercolor"}, highly detailed, atmospheric, poetic, and surreal, with delicate linework, soft mist, luminous highlights, textured paper, and a balance of negative space and dense scenic detail. Add a vertical calligraphy inscription on the lower right reading {argument name="calligraphy text" default="山水如梦"}, plus 2 small red seal stamps beneath it. Main palette: {argument name="main color palette" default="teal blue, warm gold, cream, blush pink, and charcoal ink"}. Composition emphasis: {argument name="composition focus" default="woman silhouette formed by landscape and flowing hair"}. Mood: {argument name="mood" default="tranquil, majestic, romantic, dreamlike"}.
title: Dreamlike Shanshui Woman Silhouette
description: This prompt generates a poetic vertical fantasy artwork of a female profile blended with Chinese landscape painting motifs, ideal for posters, book covers, and elegant wall art.

content: A dynamic high-fantasy anime illustration in a vertical poster composition, showing 4 heroic figures suspended in a stormy celestial sky filled with glowing clouds, blue crystal shards, and floating turquoise feathers. At the center, a tall armored male warrior inspired by a Norse god stands as the commanding focal point, with long flowing brown hair, a gold-and-teal horned helmet, a dark green and blue cape whipping in the wind, ornate black, teal, and gold armor with an open muscular chest, and a bright cyan wolf emblem glowing on his chest. He raises one hand upward toward a radiant circular magical sigil above him, while his other hand holds a long spear with a crystalline blue spearhead. Around him are 3 fox-and-wolf-like companion creatures in matching ice-crystal armor. In the lower foreground, 1 large ferocious orange wolf charges toward the viewer with its mouth open in a roar, oversized claws extended, white mane, blue crystal head armor, blue-and-gold armor plates on its back and legs, and a huge fluffy tail. On the upper left, 1 athletic orange fox warrior leaps forward midair wearing angular blue crystal armor and large faceted blue wings, posed like a fast aerial attacker. On the right, 1 small cute chibi fox companion floats happily with big blue eyes, a wide smile, a blue tunic-like outfit with glowing cyan patterns, and a crystal crown on its head. Use vivid saturated colors, especially electric cyan, sapphire blue, teal, gold, and orange. The mood is epic, divine, and magical, with strong motion lines, dramatic foreshortening, glowing highlights, detailed fur and feathers, polished crystal textures, and cinematic fantasy trading-card splash art quality.
title: Epic Norse Sky Warrior With Crystal Beasts
description: This prompt generates a dramatic vertical fantasy-anime splash illustration of a horned sky warrior with three crystal-armored animal companions, ideal for posters, card art, or game key visuals.

content: A vintage mid-century space-race propaganda poster pasted on a rough white plaster wall, photographed straight-on in natural light. The poster is slightly wrinkled, creased, and weathered, with worn edges and small tears, giving it an authentic aged paper texture. The design uses a limited retro palette of deep navy blue, faded cream, muted red-orange, and dusty teal. Large bold headline text dominates the upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="ChatGPT Images 2.0"}, with “ChatGPT” in oversized cream sans-serif letters and “Images 2.0” below in bold red-orange. On the right side, a tall retro rocket stands upright launching upward through cream-colored smoke, with the vertical body text {argument name="rocket text" default="OpenAI"} in red-orange. A thin orbital trajectory line arcs across the upper half of the poster from left to right, looping around the rocket. Near the center-left, a small detached space capsule floats along the orbital path. The lower left shows the curved horizon of Earth, rendered in a vintage illustrated style with teal oceans and cream landmasses. The bottom band is a solid red-orange strip containing small spaced-out cream text reading {argument name="tagline text" default="EXPLORING TOMORROW"}. Include 4 visible stars or celestial dots in the dark sky: 2 tiny starbursts, 1 small cream dot, and 1 larger cream dot. The overall composition should feel like a 1950s–1960s sci-fi travel poster or Soviet/American space-age advertising print, with screen-printed texture, subtle folds, nostalgic typography, and a cinematic retro-futurist mood.
title: Retro ChatGPT Images 2.0 Space Poster
description: A weathered retro-futurist poster showing ChatGPT Images 2.0 as a space-age rocket advertisement, ideal for editorial visuals about AI image generation breakthroughs.

content: A bold anime pop-art poster of a tall white-haired male sorcerer in a dark navy high-collar coat, shown from the waist up, facing forward in a confident pose with his left hand raised close to the camera making a peace sign. His face is partially obscured by a rectangular blur/censor block centered over the eyes and nose area, while his spiky silver-white hair fans outward dramatically above a dark blindfold or visor. Place a huge comic speech bubble across the top with the exact text {argument name="headline text" default="LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE!"} in heavy black all-caps sans-serif lettering. Use a vivid blue background filled with dense red and orange radial speed lines exploding outward from behind the character, creating a dynamic manga cover feel. Emphasize thick ink outlines, cel-shaded anime rendering, posterized contrast, and a slightly warped vintage-comic print look. The composition should be vertical, tightly cropped, high energy, rebellious, graphic, and meme-like, with the {argument name="character hair color" default="silver white"} hair, {argument name="coat color" default="dark navy"} coat, and {argument name="background color" default="bright blue with red-orange radial lines"} dominating the palette.
title: Anime Pop-Art Protest Poster
description: This prompt generates a bold vertical anime poster with a censored-faced character, peace sign gesture, and oversized slogan bubble for meme art, social posts, or graphic poster experiments.

content: A high-impact shonen manga anime illustration of a powerful white-haired sorcerer in a dramatic low-angle full-body pose, laughing with his head thrown back and mouth wide open, wearing a sleek black high-collar uniform and a black blindfold over his eyes. His left hand is thrust toward the viewer making a two-finger peace sign, with strong foreshortening that makes the hand large in the foreground, while his right arm hangs lower at his side. Surround him with explosive {argument name="energy color" default="electric blue"} supernatural energy, violent brushstroke-like aura trails, flying debris, sparks, and swirling curved streaks cutting across the frame. The background should be a dark, abstract, chaotic energy burst with glowing blue shards and motion lines, creating a sense of overwhelming power. Use bold cel-shaded anime rendering with painterly highlights, sharp linework, intense contrast, and glossy fabric folds on the black outfit. On the right side, add 1 large jagged white manga speech bubble with thick black outline containing the text {argument name="speech bubble text" default="LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE!"} in huge distressed black uppercase letters. Vertical composition, dynamic action poster framing, confident triumphant attitude, modern dark fantasy anime aesthetic.
title: Blindfolded Sorcerer Victory Pose
description: This prompt generates a dramatic vertical anime action poster of a blindfolded white-haired sorcerer with explosive blue energy and a bold manga speech bubble, ideal for stylized character art or fandom-inspired visuals.

content: A dramatic Japanese fantasy movie poster in a painterly, ultra-detailed cinematic illustration style. The poster is vertically composed like a theatrical key visual, with a warm gold title at the bottom and multiple emotional vignettes layered into one unified scene. The central character is a small fluffy pig-like creature with soft pale cream fur, oversized pink inner ears, a tiny snout, a curled tail, and large feathered angel wings glowing with golden light. It stands upright on a rooftop or elevated wooden platform overlooking a vast Tokyo cityscape at sunset, holding a whiskey glass in one hoof with the other hoof on its hip, posed like a weary but resilient middle-aged salaryman. In the distance are the Tokyo skyline, water, bridges, floating lanterns, and Tokyo Tower glowing orange-red under a radiant sky filled with clouds lit in gold, peach, violet, and deep blue. Around the center are 4 supporting vignette scenes: 1) top left, the winged pig sits alone at a narrow bar counter in a nostalgic lantern-lit Japanese alley at night, looking exhausted and melancholy, with a bottle and a glass nearby; 2) top center, the winged pig sits drinking with 2 human adults in an izakaya-like nightlife setting, warm lights surrounding them; 3) upper right, the winged pig walks away down railway tracks toward a brilliant ocean sunset, carrying a small suitcase, seen from behind; 4) left middle, the winged pig walks alone through a rain-slick neon-lit city street at night, seen from behind, surrounded by glowing signs and reflections. The whole image should feel bittersweet, magical, lonely, and hopeful, like a prestige animated film poster about adulthood, solitude, and emotional survival. Use lush lighting, dense environmental detail, sparkling reflections, glowing lanterns, cinematic atmosphere, and rich blue-orange color contrast. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the art: at the very top, the tagline "ひとりで生きてきた。だけど、ひとりじゃ涙は止まらない。"; above the title, the line "独身オヤジ、最後の青春。"; a very large main title at the bottom center reading "翼のオヤジ" in bold brushed calligraphic characters; below it, the tagline "笑って、泣けて、明日また頑張れる。この冬、いちばんやさしい奇跡。"; on the bottom right, a circular badge reading "秋公開" and "今"; add small fine-print credits across the lower edge in the style of a Japanese film poster. Include 2 visible vertical lantern/shop signs in the street scenes reading "居酒屋" and 1 bottle label reading "黒豚". High detail, emotional fantasy poster, premium animated-film aesthetic, Japanese urban nostalgia mixed with magical realism.
title: Japanese Fantasy Winged Pig Film Poster
description: A text prompt for generating a richly detailed Japanese animated movie poster featuring a winged pig-like protagonist in a bittersweet urban fantasy montage.

content: A nostalgic Chinese retro collage poster about {argument name="theme title" default="8090的记忆"}, designed like a worn scrapbook page mixed with a hand-painted memory map. Use a vertical composition with warm sepia, dusty red, faded orange, and aged paper beige tones. The background is old cracked paper, yellowed magazine clippings, and scuffed vintage print textures. At the upper right, show a large realistic human hand holding a black fountain pen with a gold nib, as if writing the memories onto the page. The center of the poster is a large irregular wooden plaque or cutout board containing 8 numbered memory scenes, each embedded like miniature dioramas with handwritten Chinese captions and short bullet-point notes. Scene 1, labeled "1 弹弓", shows a young boy crouching and aiming a slingshot outdoors near a stone wall and tree. Scene 2, labeled "2 滚铁环", shows 2 children running while pushing metal hoops with sticks along an alley. Scene 3, labeled "3 鞭炮", shows 2 children crouching beside lit firecrackers on the ground with smoke and red paper debris. Scene 4, labeled "4 供销社", shows an old-fashioned neighborhood supply store counter with 1 shopkeeper and 1 child customer, shelves packed with goods behind them. Scene 5, labeled "5 赶集", shows a lively rural street market with multiple adults, chickens, produce, baskets, and a bicycle vendor. Scene 6, labeled "6 戏台", shows a village opera stage with 4 performers in traditional costume under red curtains, watched by a seated audience. Scene 7, labeled "7 掏鸟窝", shows 2 boys at a tree, with 1 climbing or reaching into a bird nest and 1 watching below. Scene 8, labeled "8 摩托车", shows 2 riders on a vintage motorcycle driving down an old street at sunset. Surround the main board with exactly 10 extra nostalgic objects: 1 old children’s booklet tied with a red ribbon at upper left, 2 glass marbles nearby, 1 vintage comic or picture magazine at mid-right, 1 small blue illustrated booklet at lower left, 1 green tin frog toy near the bottom left, 1 tiny wooden chair at the lower left edge, 1 enamel mug with red Chinese text at lower right, 2 colored pencils beside the mug, and 1 school exercise notebook labeled "练习簿" at the bottom right. At the top, place the large bold Chinese headline {argument name="headline text" default="8090的记忆"} in distressed red and blue typography, with a smaller handwritten-style subtitle beneath reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="那些简单、热闹、发亮的日子"}. On the right side of the central board, add handwritten text reading "这一页，刚刚写完。" At the bottom, add a large red banner with the main quote {argument name="bottom quote" default="那时候日子不快，但快乐很满。"} and a smaller line underneath reading {argument name="bottom subquote" default="很多东西都旧了，可一想起来还是会发亮。"} The whole image should feel richly detailed, cinematic, tactile, sentimental, and deeply rooted in 1980s–1990s Chinese childhood memories, combining illustration, miniature realism, poster design, scrapbook layering, and editorial nostalgia.
title: Retro Chinese Childhood Memory Poster
description: A warm nostalgic poster-style collage of 1980s–1990s Chinese childhood memories, ideal for editorial art, social posts, or retro cultural storytelling.

content:
Create a bold Korean-style beverage advertisement poster with a warm golden splash background and dramatic commercial lighting. Show a {argument name="celebrity spokesperson" default="Donald Trump-like older male politician"} from the chest up, wearing a navy suit, white dress shirt, bright red tie, and a small American flag lapel pin, facing camera with a confident sales-pitch expression. His face is obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a skin-toned color. In his left hand, extended close to the camera in forced perspective, he holds a yellow aluminum can of Korean rice punch drink labeled prominently in Korean, with red top and bottom bands and the main product text "비락 식혜" and "Since 1993" on the can. The can also includes smaller Korean copy, an image of sweet rice drink near the bottom, and the volume text "238 ml (120 kcal)". His right hand gives a thumbs-up.

Use an energetic retro-commercial composition, with splashing sweet rice beverage and droplets behind him, glowing golden highlights, and a slightly low-angle heroic framing. At the top, include 3 distinct headline text groups: a small handwritten-style black slogan on the upper left reading "전통의 맛, 한국의 DRINK!", a huge central headline in distressed bold Korean type reading "걸죽는 땐?" in dark brown-black and "비락 식혜!" in vivid red, and a brand logo on the upper right reading "비락" with small red text "Since 1993" beneath it. Add 2 callout badges: on the left, a yellow circular seal with a tiny crown icon and the text "대한민국 국민음료 No.1"; on the right, a white speech bubble with handwritten Korean text "한국이 만든 맛있는 전통!" and red English text "I LOVE IT!".

At the bottom foreground, place 2 food elements: a brass bowl filled with sweet rice drink and floating rice grains on the left, and a wooden bowl piled with white rice on the right. Across the lower middle, add 2 lines of large brush-style promotional text, the first in white reading "달콤하게! 시원하게!" and the second in mixed white and yellow reading "속까지 시~원하게!" with an energetic yellow underline stroke. Along the very bottom, include 3 circular feature icons with captions in Korean: "국내산 쌀 엄선된 재료", "시원하게 갈증해소", and "부드러운 단맛 속 편한 식혜". In the lower right corner, add tiny disclaimer text "연출된 이미지입니다". Make the overall look glossy, exaggerated, funny, and convincing like a viral parody print ad.
title: Korean Rice Drink Parody Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a humorous, high-impact parody beverage advertisement poster featuring a famous politician-like spokesperson promoting a Korean canned rice drink.

content: A bold Korean beverage advertisement poster in a glossy commercial photography style, featuring {argument name="spokesperson" default="Donald Trump lookalike"} in a dark navy business suit, white dress shirt, and vivid blue tie, standing front-facing against a saturated bright-blue sky with a few soft white clouds and a faint modern city skyline including a tall skyscraper resembling the Empire State Building on the right. He is holding a cold plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"} dramatically toward the camera in his left hand, with extreme foreshortening so the bottle appears large in the foreground and the person is slightly behind it. The bottle is clear with condensation, a white cap, visible water inside, and a deep blue label reading “POCARI SWEAT” in large white letters with smaller text above saying “ION SUPPLY DRINK.” Add energetic frozen water splashes and droplets around the bottle, hand, and lower foreground to emphasize freshness and hydration. Place the brand logo in the upper left corner: “POCARI SWEAT” in white with the curved underline mark. Across the top, add huge distressed white Korean headline text, slightly angled and filling most of the upper half: {argument name="headline text" default="갈증 해소? 이걸로 끝! 포카리스웨트!"}. In the lower right over the suit, add a bold italic quotation in white and blue Korean text: {argument name="quote" default="WINNING은 수분 싸움! 포카리스웨트로 리프레시!"}. In the bottom left, include exactly 3 circular benefit icons stacked vertically with short Korean labels: a water drop icon with “수분 보충”, a lightning bolt icon with “전해질 보충”, and a running figure icon with “빠른 흡수”. Use a high-contrast, patriotic blue-and-white color palette, dramatic ad lighting, sharp focus on the bottle and hand, slightly softer focus on the face and background, and an overall energetic premium campaign-poster look.
title: Korean Sports Drink Celebrity Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a flashy Korean-style hydration drink poster with a celebrity-like spokesperson, oversized product bottle, and bold promotional typography for commercial advertising use.

content: A hyper-detailed Japanese parody theme park advertisement poster in a vertical format, designed like a dramatic summer travel ad mixed with a luxury attraction campaign. The setting is a tropical jungle under a vivid blue sky with scattered clouds and a bright blazing sun in the upper right corner, with palm leaves framing the top edges. Across the top, place a huge 3D stone-textured Japanese headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="ジャンキリア沖縄"}, with a smaller white Japanese tagline underneath that reads "— やんばるの大自然に包まれた、超本格ジャングル・テーマパーク —". In the center, feature a large modern smartphone standing upright and slightly tilted, dominating the composition. On its screen, show a beige ticket-lottery waiting interface with jungle silhouettes at the top and large bold Japanese text reading "整理券抽選中", a circular loading indicator, and smaller text near the bottom reading "結果発表まで30分" and "※この画面を閉じずにお待ちください". The phone status bar should show 10:00. Behind the phone on the left, place a roaring Tyrannosaurus rex emerging from jungle foliage, mouth open wide, realistic and threatening. On the right, place an ornate golden entrance gate with detailed carvings and a sign reading "プレミアムパス入口", leading to a red-carpeted premium entry lane. In the foreground and midground, show a long crowded queue of park visitors stretching deep into the scene, all wearing casual summer clothing, hats, towels, backpacks, and carrying umbrellas, fans, and water bottles, suggesting extreme heat and exhaustion. Several people nearest the viewer should have blurred faces. On the far left, add a giant weathered stone sign with huge red Japanese text reading "待ち時間 180分". At the lower left, include 3 stacked rustic wooden signboards: the top sign has a blue parking icon and text "駐車場 2,000円"; the middle sign has a smartphone icon and text "アプリ必須 ダウンロードしてね!"; the bottom sign has a dinosaur silhouette and text "当選者だけが冒険へ". Along the lower right side, place very large vertical white brush-style Japanese copy reading "待つこと、それが冒険だ。". Near the bottom right, include 3 small circular icon callouts with short Japanese promotional lines: "抽選に選ばれし者だけが、恐竜に会える。", "スマホの充電が尽きる前に、夢は始まる。", and "プレミアムな近道も、ご用意しました。" with icons suggesting dinosaur, phone battery, and VIP access. At the very bottom center, add a black disclaimer strip with small white Japanese text reading "このポスターは架空のパロディ広告です". The overall style should be ultra-realistic, cinematic, high-contrast, satirical, and polished like a premium commercial poster, with exaggerated theme park hype, oppressive heat, and absurd queue-based adventure as the core joke.
title: Japanese Jungle Theme Park Parody Poster
description: A cinematic satirical Japanese ad poster for a fictional jungle dinosaur theme park, ideal for parody campaigns, social media visuals, or mock promotional key art.

content: A cinematic surreal space scene showing 1 astronaut floating in open space beside Earth, with the planet dominating the left side of the frame and the astronaut on the right, drifting backward with bent legs and one arm reaching toward the planet. The astronaut wears a realistic white EVA-style spacesuit with a dark reflective visor, a backpack unit, and a shoulder patch in red, yellow, and green. Earth is shown from the Atlantic side with North and South America clearly visible, lit by a cool blue rim glow against a deep black star field with sparse tiny stars. Across the continents and faintly across the oceans, organic branching root-like or neural vein structures spread over the surface, especially dense across North America and extending into South America, creating a dark biomechanical or living-planet effect. Use dramatic low-key lighting, strong contrast, moody shadows, photorealistic textures, ultra-detailed cinematic realism, a quiet ominous atmosphere, and a wide composition with large negative space.
title: Astronaut Beside Living Earth
description: This prompt generates a moody cinematic sci-fi image of a lone astronaut floating next to a root-covered Earth, ideal for surreal space art or AI-themed editorial visuals.

content: Create a vintage Korean food poster on aged beige parchment paper with a slightly stained, textured background, dark ornamental border corners, and a traditional hand-painted ink-and-watercolor illustration style. The poster is a single vertically stacked infographic about {argument name="dish name" default="정통 한국 김밥"}, with elegant large Korean calligraphy at the top and a curved ribbon banner beneath it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="Traditional Korean Gimbap"}. In the upper center, show a large porcelain plate piled high with exactly 12 sliced gimbap pieces, each slice showing distinct fillings in white rice, yellow egg, orange carrot, green spinach, and dark seaweed wrapping. To the right of the plate, add a small porcelain bowl of kimchi and a short handwritten Korean note reading “간단한 보여도 정성이 들어간 한국의 맛! ♥”. Include a small red seal stamp with Korean text near the upper right. In the middle, add a labeled ingredients section on a ribbon header reading “재료”, showing exactly 6 ingredient panels in one row: 1. 김 (건김) as stacked seaweed sheets, 2. 밥 (양념 밥) as a bowl of rice, 3. 계란 (지단용) as sliced cooked egg strips, 4. 당근 (채썰어볶기) as julienned carrots, 5. 시금치 (데쳐서 무치기) as seasoned spinach, 6. 단무지 (김밥용) as yellow pickled radish strips. Below that, add another ribbon header reading “만드는 순서” and show exactly 6 framed step panels in two rows of three, connected left-to-right with arrows. Step 1 is labeled “1 밥 간하기” and shows a bowl of rice with sesame oil and salt beside it, caption “밥에 참기름 소금으로 간하기”. Step 2 is labeled “2 속재료 준비하기” and shows a cutting board with egg, carrot, and spinach plus a knife, caption “재료 볶아 속재료 준비하기”. Step 3 is labeled “3 김과 밥 펴기” and shows seaweed on a bamboo mat with rice spread over it, caption “김에 밥 얇게 펴기”. Step 4 is labeled “4 속재료 얹기” and shows the fillings arranged in horizontal rows over rice, caption “속재료를 차례로 얹기”. Step 5 is labeled “5 단단하게 말기” and shows two hands rolling the bamboo mat tightly, caption “김밥을 단단하게 말기”. Step 6 is labeled “6 썰어 완성하기” and shows a chef’s knife slicing a gimbap roll into pieces, caption “먹기 좋게 썰어 완성!”. At the bottom, add a wide banner with bold Korean calligraphy reading {argument name="bottom slogan" default="정성 가득한 한 줄의 행복!"} and a small heart. Decorate the lower corners with floral motifs and add a red square seal with the Chinese character “福” at the bottom right. Use muted sepia, brown, cream, olive green, and faded red tones, with finely sketched outlines, gentle watercolor shading, and authentic printed-poster composition. Add a small modern overlay logo in the top-left corner reading {argument name="brand text" default="Pollo AI GPT Image 2"}.
title: Vintage Korean Gimbap Recipe Poster
description: This prompt generates an antique-style Korean recipe infographic poster for gimbap, suitable for food marketing, restaurant decor, or cultural cooking visuals.

content:
Using the attached character, generate the following:

# Instructions
Create a minimalist theater-style vertical poster for {argument name="user input" default="[user input]"} using monochrome + {argument name="accent color" default="one accent color"}.

# Layout Requirements
- Place the title largely in the bottom 1/4 area, with the Japanese title at maximum size and the English subtitle small directly underneath.
- Place a catchphrase (1-2 lines) in the top center.
- Stack 3-4 awards/official certification badges vertically in the top-left corner.
- Place a vertical catchphrase (2-3 lines) along the right edge.
- Position the main character as a silhouette from behind, slightly left of the center.
- Represent fantastical elements (floating islands, giant creatures) in the background as silhouettes.
- Place staff credits, release date, and distribution info in a small horizontal line at the bottom.
- Highlight the release date in a large font at the bottom right.

# Design Requirements
- Keep the background monochrome (black to gray gradient).
- Use only one accent color (e.g., vivid cobalt blue or gold).
- Combine silhouette and thin line art styles.
- Emphasize the title text with white + the accent color.
- Create a cinematic and artistic atmosphere overall.
- Avoid colorful backgrounds, excessive decoration, or heavy use of gradients.
- Format: Vertical, aspect ratio 2:3, high resolution.
title: Minimalist Cinematic Vertical Poster with Character Reference
description: A sophisticated prompt for creating minimalist, monochrome posters with single accent colors while maintaining character consistency from a reference image.

content: A bright, hyper-energetic Japanese movie poster illustration in a polished anime chibi style, set in a sparkling tropical ocean adventure scene. Center the composition on 2 cute chibi children riding a smiling blue shark that leaps diagonally upward through swirling seawater and white splash effects. The left child is a boy with short black hair, huge glossy blue eyes, a happy open-mouth smile, a black T-shirt, dark shorts, white sneakers, and a light blue shark hoodie with a tooth-edged hood framing his face; he points upward with one hand and hugs the shark with the other. The right child is a girl with orange hair, large glossy purple eyes, a joyful open-mouth smile, an orange dress, pink shoes, and a pink shark hoodie with a tooth-edged hood; she throws one arm wide in excitement while holding on with the other. Make the shark large and friendly with a rounded body, pale belly, tiny black eyes, and a wide open mouth. Surround them with a vivid underwater-and-surface world: schools of small tropical fish, exactly 1 sea turtle on the left, exactly 1 dolphin on the right, exactly 1 pink octopus on the right, exactly 1 pufferfish on the lower left, coral reefs and sea plants along the bottom edges, air bubbles throughout, and strong blue water motion lines. In the upper background, show a sunny sky with dramatic sun rays streaming into the water, fluffy clouds, 2 seagulls flying, a rocky tropical island with palm trees on the upper left, and a pirate ship on the upper right with white sails and a cute shark emblem. Add a ship wheel partly visible behind the main title. Use a dense, exciting Japanese kids-anime promotional layout with oversized 3D lettering and explosive effects. At the top, place the giant Japanese title text {argument name="headline text" default="サメなの ワクワク 大作戦"} in stacked lines, with glossy blue, orange-pink, and yellow-orange gradient letters, thick white outlines, dark blue shadows, water splashes, and sparkles. Beneath the title, add a smaller curved Japanese tagline in white with blue outline: {argument name="tagline" default="さあ、海のむこうへ！最高の冒険がはじまる！"}. At the bottom, place huge release text in Japanese, {argument name="release text" default="2026年 夏公開"}, in bold red-to-yellow gradient 3D letters with white and blue edging, sitting over a radiant orange burst. On the lower right, add a blue starburst badge with the Japanese text {argument name="badge text" default="ドキドキ！ワクワク！いっしょに出発だ！"} in white and yellow. Include exactly 2 treasure-themed corner props: an open treasure chest with gold coins at the lower left and a compass at the lower right. The overall look should be glossy, saturated, family-friendly, whimsical, cinematic, and toy-like, with crisp outlines, exaggerated expressions, high contrast, and a poster-ready vertical composition. No photorealism, no muted colors, no minimalism.
title: Chibi Shark Adventure Movie Poster
description: A colorful Japanese-style anime poster for a children’s ocean adventure film, ideal for recreating bold promotional key art with cute characters and dramatic title typography.

She wears a frilly black-and-pink gothic lolita idol dress with lace, ribbons, bows, heart ornaments, and sparkling textures, plus 1 black lace bow headband with a pink jeweled heart, 3 visible hair accessories on her bangs, 1 pair of dangling heart earrings, and 1 black choker with a small heart charm. Surround the character with a glowing, glitter-filled, candy-pink background full of bokeh, sparkles, soft neon light effects, and idol-fan atmosphere. content: A breathtaking anime movie poster at golden-hour sunset, vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, painted in the polished cinematic style of a Makoto Shinkai-inspired youth drama. The scene overlooks a Japanese coastal hillside town descending toward a glowing bay, with the sun low on the horizon and its reflection stretching across calm water. The sky dominates most of the image: a vast deep-blue to lavender twilight gradient filled with countless stars, wispy pink and peach clouds, and one especially bright star near the upper right. In the foreground on the right, a teenage schoolgirl stands in three-quarter side profile facing left toward the sea, shown from mid-thigh up, with shoulder-length dark hair blowing in the breeze, a short-sleeved white sailor-style school blouse, a red ribbon at the collar, and a navy pleated skirt; her expression is contemplative and wistful. Farther down the steep stone stair street in the center-left, a teenage schoolboy stands with his back to the viewer, wearing a short-sleeved white shirt and dark trousers, also looking toward the sunset and ocean. At the lower right, include 1 black cat sitting on a wall or rooftop edge in silhouette, looking toward the town. At the lower left, include 1 old-fashioned streetlamp and a dense cluster of blooming hydrangeas in blue and violet along a stone wall. The town below is packed with tiled rooftops, narrow streets, warm window lights, and layered houses, with distant mountains framing the bay. Use dramatic rim light, luminous atmospheric perspective, sparkling highlights, delicate cloud detail, and emotional, nostalgic color grading in indigo, ultramarine, pink, peach, and gold. Design it explicitly as a Japanese animated film poster with elegant typography integrated into the artwork: large hand-brushed Japanese title text across the upper-left to center reading {argument name="title text" default="星をつなぐ約束のうた"}, smaller English subtitle beneath it reading {argument name="English subtitle" default="The Song of Promises"}, a small award-laurel line in Japanese at the top left, 1 vertical Japanese tagline along the upper-right edge, 4 cast names in Japanese centered near the bottom, a release date at the lower left reading {argument name="release date" default="8.23"} with "ROADSHOW" below, 1 pink Japanese tagline across the lower center, and a website/social handle at the lower right. Ultra-detailed anime key visual, romantic and melancholic, premium feature-film poster finish.

description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese anime movie poster featuring two students overlooking a seaside town at sunset, ideal for cinematic key visuals and romantic drama promotional art.

content:
A gigantic ultra-detailed fantasy mandala poster featuring exactly 108 distinct chibi characters arranged in concentric circular rings around a radiant central emblem. The composition is perfectly symmetrical overall and fills a wide horizontal canvas like an ornate collectible mural. In the center, place a glowing golden core with 9 chibi animal-fantasy mascots clustered in a circular medallion, each with oversized heads, tiny bodies, expressive eyes, and luxurious costume details. Surround this center with multiple evenly spaced concentric rings containing the remaining 99 characters, each character occupying its own wedge-like segment and designed as a unique elemental or mythical variation. Include fox-like, rabbit-like, cat-like, wolf-like, lion-like, bird-like, dragon-like, deer-like, and hybrid beast characters, all rendered in a cute super-deformed style but with epic high-fantasy armor, robes, crowns, feathers, horns, gems, capes, staffs, and magical accessories. Make every character visually distinct through color, silhouette, species traits, and elemental theme, while preserving a unified painterly anime-fantasy aesthetic.

Use a rich palette dominated by luminous gold, ivory, cream, violet, indigo, sapphire, and soft amber, with accents of crimson, icy cyan, emerald, and sunset orange. Give the image the feel of a sacred celestial chart or zodiac wheel, with each circular band separated by elegant gilded borders and arc dividers. Add glowing magical energy, sparkles, halos, swirling fire, mist, snow, clouds, water splashes, lightning curls, floral motifs, and celestial particles around many of the characters. Around the outer perimeter, place several larger decorative guardian illustrations integrated into the border: a bright sun medallion at the upper left, a white phoenix-like bird in a circular panel at the upper right, a floral or starburst medallion at the lower right, and a fiery character cluster in a circular panel at the lower left, plus additional large elemental beast figures embedded along the left and right edges. Frame the entire artwork with an elaborate antique ornamental border inspired by illuminated manuscripts and fantasy tarot designs, using filigree, corner medallions, geometric trim, and arcane motifs.

The rendering should be extremely dense and crisp, like a 4k fantasy illustration meant for a poster print, with tiny readable character silhouettes across the whole image, intricate linework, soft watercolor-textured shading, glowing highlights, and a polished collectible-card-game concept art finish. Emphasize abundance, harmony, and radial order: exactly 108 chibi figures total, arranged as a majestic mandala of mythical elemental mascots.
title: 108 Chibi Fantasy Mandala
description: A highly detailed wide fantasy poster showing exactly 108 unique chibi mythical creatures arranged in concentric mandala rings, ideal for decorative key art or showcase illustrations.

Show a sunlit coastal road curving along a stone waterfront in Valletta, viewed from slightly above and behind a classic white 1960s sedan driving away from the viewer in the lower left foreground; the rear license plate reads {argument name="license plate" default="MTA 1964"}. Across the harbor, depict warm honey-colored limestone buildings climbing the hillside, including 1 large domed church, 1 tall narrow church spire, rows of historic townhouses with several colorful enclosed wooden balconies, and distant city walls stretching across the opposite shoreline. In the bay, include exactly 3 traditional Maltese fishing boats in vivid blue, yellow, red, and green, plus 2 tiny white sailboats farther back. Add exactly 4 white seagulls flying across a brilliant turquoise-blue sky with soft white clouds. Frame the whole composition with dark leafy trees and abundant bright magenta bougainvillea blossoms arching in from the top and right edges, with more flowers in the lower right corner, creating a lush border around the scene. Include a palm tree among the waterfront buildings and a spiky agave plant in the lower left foreground. Use warm golden sunlight, saturated coastal colors, romantic vacation-poster composition, clean readable typography, and a nostalgic, idealized Mediterranean atmosphere.

content: A dark epic sci-fi movie poster for {argument name="film title" default="EMPIRE OF THE VOID"}, in a highly cinematic photorealistic space-opera style. Centered composition with a tall alien emperor standing behind a massive circular command table, viewed from slightly below to make the figure feel imposing and godlike. The emperor wears ornate black and gunmetal biomechanical armor with sharp layered pauldrons, engraved metallic filigree, a long dark cloak, and a regal elongated helmet-crown. The face is mostly obscured in shadow, giving a mysterious, intimidating presence. One large clawed hand rests prominently on the glowing table in the foreground. The command table displays a luminous spiral galaxy hologram in blue-violet tones, with concentric interface rings and subtle cosmic light. The setting is the bridge of a colossal starship or throne room, with two curved panoramic windows framing outer space. Outside the windows are 8 visible spacecraft total: 4 on the left side and 4 on the right side, including several large battleships and smaller escort vessels. A huge planet fills much of the left background, while the right background shows a purple-blue nebula and starfield. Two secondary alien officers are seated in the mid-background, 1 on the left and 1 on the right, each at glowing futuristic control consoles. The color palette is deep black, steel gray, indigo, violet, and cold blue, with dramatic rim lighting, glossy metallic reflections, and dense atmospheric shadows. The layout should feel like a premium blockbuster poster: a centered top tagline in small uppercase text reading {argument name="tagline" default="INTELLIGENCE. DOMINION. DESTINY. THE GALAXY BOWS TO NONE."}, the giant title near the bottom in elegant spaced serif capitals with the words {argument name="main title" default="EMPIRE"} on the first line and {argument name="subtitle" default="OF THE VOID"} below it, with the letter O stylized as a glowing black-hole eclipse. Beneath that, add a glowing imperial trident-like emblem centered above the release line {argument name="release text" default="COMING SOON"}. At the very bottom, include a dense strip of tiny production credits in authentic movie-poster typography. Ultra-detailed, symmetrical, ominous, imperial, galactic conquest mood, vertical one-sheet poster, premium VFX key art, sharp focus, high contrast, dramatic sci-fi lighting.
title: Dark Space Emperor Movie Poster
description: A cinematic sci-fi poster showing an armored alien ruler on a starship bridge, ideal for blockbuster space-opera key art and film promotion.

content: A surreal cinematic outdoor portrait of a masked archer standing in a dry field under a deep clear blue sky, framed from about the knees up in a wide horizontal composition. The central figure is a woman-like person in a vintage prairie-style dress and matching headscarf, aiming a simple wooden longbow toward the left side of the frame with an arrow drawn back to the cheek. Her face is fully obscured by a soft rectangular blur or blocky censorship patch, creating an uncanny anonymous effect. The dress is sage green with long puffed sleeves, a gathered waist tied with a sash, and a tiny repeating red-and-white floral dot pattern. A red cloth or scarf is wrapped around the lower face and neck beneath the green head covering. Surrounding her are 12 animals total: 8 white birds flying across the sky at different distances, 2 larger white birds standing on the ground at the right side, 1 deer head entering from the lower left foreground, and 1 sheep or goat head entering from the lower right foreground. Add 1 red-headed crane-like bird at the far right edge, visible in profile. The image should feel dreamlike, strange, and symbolic rather than realistic, with crisp midday sunlight, rich saturated colors, soft film grain, and a slightly vintage editorial-photography look. Use low-angle perspective, dynamic diagonal lines from the bow and arrow, and layered animal placement to create tension and motion. Dry grasses appear at the bottom edge, but the background is mostly open sky. Highly detailed fabric folds, natural bird wing positions, and a balanced surreal composition.
title: Surreal Archer With Birds and Animals
description: This prompt generates a dreamlike cinematic fashion-style portrait of a masked archer surrounded by birds and animals, useful for surreal editorial or fine-art image creation.

content:
Create a square infographic-style illustration showing a {argument name="grid size" default="15×15"} invention timeline grid rendered as a collection of miniature isometric dioramas on aged parchment tiles. The image should look like a curated historical poster that spans from {argument name="starting year" default="1000 BC"} to {argument name="ending year" default="2026"}, with one invention per tile and no repeats. Show the visible portion as a 5 by 5 section of the larger grid, for a total of 25 labeled tiles, arranged in neat rows and columns with thin dark borders. Every tile contains a unique world-changing invention depicted as a small handcrafted diorama with era-appropriate materials, colors, and background details. Use a warm antiquarian palette for ancient and medieval inventions, sepia technical-document tones for early modern inventions, and cooler neon-blue futuristic lighting for modern digital and biotech inventions. Surround the grid with an old-map border and subtle historical cartography textures, blending into faint modern network graphics near the bottom right.

Label each visible tile with a small beige caption tag in bold black text. Include exactly these 25 visible inventions in reading order from top left to bottom right: 1) {argument name="first tile label" default="1000 BC"} tile showing an iron plow and simple hand tools in a farm field, captioned "Iron Plow & Tools"; 2) "Concept of Zero" shown as a parchment-like tile with a carved zero symbol and a blue hourglass; 3) "Water Clock" shown as a wooden water-timing device; 4) "Catapult" shown as a wooden siege engine; 5) "Antikythera Mechanism" shown as an intricate bronze gear device in a stone niche; 6) "Concrete" shown as a wheelbarrow filled with wet cement or mortar; 7) "Wheelbarrow" shown as a simple wooden one-wheel cart; 8) "Windmill" shown as a traditional mill on grassy ground; 9) "Gunpowder" shown as a barrel and a mound of black powder with smoke; 10) "Printing Press" shown as a wooden press framed by classical columns; 11) "Mechanical Clock" shown as an ornate standing clock; 12) "Telescope" shown as an early brass telescope on a tripod with sketch-like scientific notes; 13) "Steam Engine" shown on a blue blueprint-style tile with an early locomotive engine; 14) "Electric Battery" shown on a blueprint-like tile with two cylindrical battery cells and wiring; 15) "Telegraph" shown as a Morse telegraph key on technical paper; 16) "Light Bulb" shown glowing warmly on a neutral pedestal; 17) "Automobile" shown as an early red motorcar on a workshop-plan background; 18) "Airplane" shown as a commercial jet aircraft in miniature; 19) "Transistor" shown as a black microchip on a luminous circuit-board tile; 20) "Personal Computer" shown as a beige desktop computer with CRT monitor and keyboard; 21) "World Wide Web" shown as a glowing blue globe over digital circuitry; 22) "Smartphone" shown as a sleek modern phone on a neon-tech background; 23) "CRISPR-Cas9" shown as a DNA double helix in a biotech-blue display tile; 24) "Reusable Rocket" shown as several upright rockets launching with exhaust clouds; 25) "AI (LLMs)" shown as glowing large letters AI in a holographic tech cube; 26) "Brain-Computer Interface" shown as a glowing brain hologram on a blue platform; 27) "Advanced Neural Interface (Implant)" shown as a transparent human head profile with a glowing brain implant, with a small top label reading "2026".

Keep the composition highly organized, poster-like, and visually dense, with each tile readable at a glance. Use slight isometric perspective, crisp linework, painterly shading, and polished editorial illustration quality. The overall feeling should combine museum poster, educational timeline, and imaginative historical-tech diorama art.
title: Historical Invention Timeline Grid
description: This prompt generates a parchment-styled educational poster showing a grid of labeled invention dioramas across history, ideal for timeline infographics and world-changing technology comparisons.

content: A dramatic ultra-wide aerial tiny-planet photograph of {argument name="city name" default="Canakkale"}, Turkey, rendered as a full 360-degree stereographic projection so the city and waterfront form a compact spherical world surrounded by a swirling ring of blue sky and white clouds. The viewpoint is high above the shoreline in bright daytime with crisp summer light, realistic colors, and strong photographic detail. Place the large hillside sign reading {argument name="landmark sign text" default="Canakkale"} prominently across the center of the miniature planet. On the left-upper side of the sphere, show a tall pale stone clock tower with a small red Turkish flag at the top, surrounded by dense urban blocks with red-tiled roofs and mid-rise buildings. On the right side, include a vivid blue harbor with 2 white passenger ferries docked along the waterfront and a long curving coastline extending into the distance. In the lower-right quadrant, feature the monumental dark wooden Trojan horse statue on a circular plaza. In the lower-left quadrant, include the large rectangular concrete memorial structure set within green parkland. Cover the planet with winding pedestrian paths, lawns, trees, and landscaped gardens, with city streets and waterfront promenades visible around the edges. Use a highly realistic drone-photo look, deep depth of field, sharp textures, slightly exaggerated fisheye distortion from the tiny-planet projection, and a majestic travel-poster composition emphasizing the contrast between the green park, historic landmarks, and sparkling sea.
title: Tiny Planet Aerial of Canakkale
description: This prompt generates a realistic 360-degree tiny-planet drone view of Canakkale's waterfront landmarks, ideal for travel imagery and city-poster visuals.

content:
A dramatic Japanese fantasy anime movie poster, vertical one-sheet composition, centered on a beautiful teenage girl with very long flowing silver-white hair, glowing golden eyes, and a calm inviting smile, reaching one hand toward the viewer. She wears a black-and-white celestial dress with a fitted corset bodice, white chest panel, black ribbon lacing at the front, detached black sleeves with soft white ruffles, a black belt at the waist, layered skirt panels decorated with exactly 3 gold crescent moon ornaments, and a black choker with a gold crescent moon pendant. She also has exactly 1 gold crescent moon hair clip near her bangs. Behind her is a luminous night sky filled with stars, nebula-like clouds, and a huge eclipsed moon halo directly above her head, plus exactly 3 floating crescent-ring light effects around the left side of her hair. The background shows an ornate fantasy city with towering gothic palace architecture, spires, observatory-like structures, and glowing windows, all bathed in cool moonlight. Use a rich palette of deep indigo, violet, midnight blue, silver, and gold, with sparkles, magical particles, rim lighting, glossy highlights, and a slightly dense, painterly modern-anime poster finish.

Design it as a fully typeset Japanese film poster with elegant serif display typography in gold and white. At the very top, place a centered headline in Japanese: {argument name="headline text" default="夜が欠けるたび、忘れていた真実が目を覚ます。"}. On the right side, set a large vertical Japanese tagline in gold: {argument name="right-side tagline" default="最後の月光が消える前に、世界の記憶をつなぎ直せ。"}. On the left side, arrange 4 stacked blocks of smaller Japanese body copy separated by decorative divider lines and crescent motifs. Add a circular gold burst badge on the lower right with Japanese promotional text inside. Across the lower middle, place the large glowing Japanese title in ornate gold-white lettering: {argument name="movie title" default="月蝕のリグレット"}. Beneath the title, add a smaller centered Japanese subtitle line. Below that, place a horizontal feature line with exactly 3 gold-separated phrases in Japanese: "記憶", "月光", "観測魔法". At the very bottom, add 3 short Japanese teaser lines spread left, center, and right, and a large glowing release line centered under them: {argument name="release text" default="近日公開"}. The overall feeling is epic, melancholic, magical, celestial, romantic, and nostalgic, like a high-budget fantasy anime film poster.
title: Celestial Anime Fantasy Movie Poster
description: This prompt generates a fully typeset Japanese fantasy anime film poster featuring a silver-haired moon-themed heroine, ideal for cinematic key art and promotional poster concepts.

content: An epic cinematic poster in a dark golden bronze palette, styled like a mythic gladiator movie poster merged with vintage Formula 1 iconography. Two legendary rival drivers face away from each other in mirrored side-profile bust portraits at the top half of the image, one on the left inspired by Ayrton Senna and one on the right inspired by Alain Prost, both depicted as heroic Roman gladiators with weathered bronze armor, dramatic shoulder plates, and racing colors draped as cloaks. The left figure wears green, yellow, and blue accents, and the right figure wears blue, white, and red accents. Their faces are mostly in shadow, lit by intense backlight through storm clouds, creating a solemn, monumental mood. Behind each driver hangs 1 vertical banner, for a total of 2 banners: the left banner is dark green with a large gold S, the text "SENNA", "#12", and a cursive signature; the right banner is dark blue with a large gold P, the text "PROST", "#1", and a cursive signature. Centered near the top, in elegant serif French text, place the line "DEUX LÉGENDES. UN SEUL TRÔNE." with a small gold Formula 1 emblem and laurel motif below it. In the central sky, add 2 stacked lines of French text reading "RIVAUX SUR LA PISTE." and "LÉGENDES POUR TOUJOURS." The main title dominates the middle in huge metallic serif lettering: "{argument name="headline text" default="SENNA vs PROST"}", with a sword-like vertical separator for "vs". Beneath it, a subtitle in French reads "LE COMBAT ULTIME DE LA F1". The lower half shows a colossal Roman colosseum packed with spectators, flags, arches, dust, smoke, and dramatic perspective lines converging on the center. At the exact center of the arena stands 1 large victory banner with the words "VICTOIRE GLOIRE HONNEUR" in gold. In the foreground, place 2 front-facing late-1980s Formula 1 cars charging toward the viewer on a dirt-covered arena floor, throwing dust. The left car is associated with Senna and features red-and-white Marlboro-inspired livery, Shell branding, and the number 12 on the nose, with the driver wearing a yellow helmet. The right car is associated with Prost and features matching red-and-white Marlboro-inspired livery, Shell branding, and the number 1 on the nose, with the driver wearing a white helmet. At the very bottom, add the line "1988. 1989. 1990." and below it "L’HISTOIRE S’ÉCRIT À PLUS DE 300 KM/H." Include a small ornamental laurel decoration under the final line. Use hyper-detailed textures, dramatic storm clouds, god rays, flying dust, intense contrast, symmetrical composition, ultra-polished poster design, heroic scale, and a timeless legendary atmosphere.
title: Epic Senna vs Prost Gladiator Poster
description: A dramatic vintage-style motorsport poster depicting Senna and Prost as mythic gladiator rivals, ideal for recreating cinematic tribute art or high-impact F1 legend posters.

content: A dramatic dark-fantasy portrait of an elderly wizard standing in a stormy wasteland under a black, cloud-choked sky. He wears a tall, weathered pointed hat with a brown leather band and a tiny metal clasp, and a heavy dark blue-gray robe with wide sleeves. His face is mostly hidden in shadow beneath the hat brim, with long strands of glowing {argument name="accent hair color" default="electric blue"} hair peeking out at the sides and a very long flowing silver-white beard reaching down his chest. The wizard thrusts his left hand toward the camera in a powerful forced-perspective pose, fingers spread, conjuring a bright orb of blue-white magical energy in his palm with crackling lightning arcs wrapping around the hand and sleeve. In his right arm he clutches a large ancient leather spellbook with worn corners, metal fittings, embossed arcane markings on the cover, and a few pages visible. The background shows a barren dark landscape and exactly 1 prominent lightning bolt striking on the right side of the frame. Cinematic high-contrast lighting, hyper-detailed skin and fabric texture, moody photorealism, sharp focus on the hand and beard, intense fantasy atmosphere, centered composition, square crop.
title: Storm Wizard Casting Lightning
description: A cinematic photorealistic fantasy prompt for generating a dramatic wizard portrait with storm lighting and crackling magical energy.

content: Using the provided reference image of the mobile app screen, transform it into a premium editorial magazine cover mockup about agricultural innovation. Keep the app UI recognizable on the phone display, but place it in a realistic lifestyle context: a vineyard worker in the foreground holding a smartphone that shows the app, with vineyard rows, mountains, and a few workers in the background under natural daylight. Design the full page as a Spanish-language magazine cover with a refined agricultural-business aesthetic in green, cream, and earthy tones. Add a large masthead at the top reading “REVISTA CAMPO FUTURO”, a thin top strapline with 3 items separated by vertical bars: “Especial Viñas de Chile”, “Innovación agrícola”, and “Abril 2026”, plus a subtitle line beneath the masthead: “Agricultura, innovación y gestión rural”. On the left, add a green section tag reading “TECNOLOGÍA AGRÍCOLA” and a bold stacked main cover headline: “La app con IA que está revolucionando el campo”, followed by a short deck about Kimün replacing the traditional notebook and giving real-time control to vineyards and agricultural businesses. Add a circular callout badge mentioning a special feature about Kimün as an intelligent field notebook with AI. Include 2 bottom teaser photos: one close-up of the worker holding the phone in the vineyard with page label “p.18” and a caption about field diagnosis and cellphone alerts, and one small group scene with 3 people reviewing the app together with page label “p.24” and a caption about connected field teams, voice, records, and instant costs. On the right column, add 3 article teasers with icons and page numbers: one about the end of paper and the new era of the intelligent field notebook (p.30), one about more efficient vineyards through better data-driven decisions (p.36), and one about water management 4.0 and smarter, more profitable irrigation (p.42). Add a footer strip with 5 category labels: “AGRICULTURA”, “FRUTALES”, “VIÑAS”, “GANADERÍA”, “SUSTENTABILIDAD”, plus a barcode and a small price. Make it look like a polished real magazine cover photo shoot and editorial layout, not a flat app screenshot.
title: Agritech magazine cover from app screenshot
description: This prompt turns a mobile app screenshot into a realistic Spanish-language agricultural magazine cover, useful for product marketing, launch visuals, and editorial-style mockups.

content: A vintage travel poster for {argument name="destination name" default="KYOTO"}, Japan, designed in a nostalgic mid-century tourism style with a faded paper texture, softly worn edges, and warm sun-aged colors. Use a vertical poster layout with rounded corners and a cream border. At the top, place the large headline {argument name="headline text" default="KYOTO"} in oversized elegant red serif letters, with “JAPAN” centered below in dark blue serif type and thin decorative divider lines. Add an italic tagline beneath it reading {argument name="tagline text" default="Timeless Beauty. Endless Memories."}. The main image should show a dramatic low-angle view of a traditional five-story Japanese pagoda in vivid vermilion red with dark wooden eaves and black railings, standing on a stone base with a wooden walkway in the foreground. Surround the pagoda with green wooded hills, a bright blue sky, and soft cream-colored clouds. On the left side, include a vertical red label with white Japanese characters reading “京都、日本”. Also add a blooming cherry blossom branch entering from the left, with clusters of pale pink flowers. In the upper right corner, include a postage stamp featuring a pagoda silhouette in muted red tones, partially overlapped by a circular postal cancellation mark reading “KYOTO JAPAN” with the kanji “京都” in the center and a few wavy postmark lines extending rightward. At the bottom, add a centered vintage footer slogan in serif capitals reading {argument name="footer text" default="DISCOVER TRADITION. EMBRACE KYOTO."}. The overall look should feel romantic, collectible, slightly distressed, and like a classic Japanese tourism print from the 1950s or 1960s.
title: Vintage Kyoto Travel Poster
description: This prompt generates a retro-style Kyoto tourism poster, ideal for travel art prints, editorial covers, or destination-themed wall decor.

content: A richly layered maximalist collage poster in portrait orientation, designed as a celebration of art, science, history, and human creativity. At the exact center, place a large irregular black ink-splatter or torn-paper void with radiant multicolored streaks around it, containing elegant large serif typography reading {argument name="headline text" default="Create Everything at Once"} in warm ivory. Surround the center with a dense scrapbook-style arrangement of exactly 33 visible items overlapping edge to edge like a curated mood board: 1 illuminated medieval manuscript page with ornate floral border in the top left, 1 botanical mushroom study sheet near it, 1 star chart or astronomical diagram page, 1 solar system illustration across the upper top center with planets on orbit lines against deep space, 1 periodic table chart in the upper middle-left, 1 circular night-sky constellation map in the upper middle-right, 1 cluster of blue crystals, 1 alpine mountain landscape painting, 1 geometric mosaic tile fragment in the top right corner, 1 blue-and-white ceramic teapot on the right edge, 1 antique tribal mask on the right-center, 1 torn vertical calligraphy page with multilingual writing, 1 small isometric polyhedron or gemstone drawing, 1 pixel-art rocket icon card, 1 multicolored wayfinding sign with arrows and transport symbols, 1 black-and-white architectural sketch page along the right side, 1 iridescent feather in the lower-right edge, 1 underwater coral reef photo in the bottom-right corner, 1 purple amethyst cluster, 1 triangular geometric mosaic textile or tile pattern, 1 colorful woven textile swatch, 1 circular carved stone calendar disk, 1 black-and-white city skyline print, 1 botanical flower drawing near the bottom center, 1 stained-glass window illustration, 1 blue architectural blueprint sheet, 1 color wheel chart, 1 abstract blue cell-like or mineral micrograph image, 1 Great Wave-style Japanese seascape print on the lower left, 1 ancient Greek pottery fragment, 1 anatomical human muscle illustration on the left side, 1 butterfly specimen card, and 1 vintage silver camera just left of center. Add a second small botanical flower sketch near the lower-left center and a parchment map fragment tucked behind the camera area as subtle fillers while keeping the total primary featured objects at 33. Blend media styles including engraving, scientific diagrams, vintage prints, fine art painting, photography, textile patterns, blueprints, and digital design UI. Near the bottom left, include 1 dark computer interface panel showing node-based creative software and color grading tools with charts and a circular color selector, suggesting modern AI-assisted creation. Use torn paper edges, aged parchment textures, ink stains, saturated jewel tones, deep blues, golds, creams, and pops of neon cyan, magenta, orange, and violet. The composition should feel exuberant, intelligent, and inspirational, with every object sharply readable and carefully arranged into a seamless museum-meets-studio collage. High detail, editorial poster design, premium print look, balanced chaos, dramatic contrast, soft paper shadows, subtle depth from layered overlaps, no empty background beyond the collage.
title: Maximalist Create Everything Poster
description: A dense editorial collage poster centered on a bold inspirational headline, ideal for generating artwork about creativity spanning science, art, culture, and technology.

content: A Japanese movie-poster style anime illustration, vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, showing a teenage schoolgirl seated alone in a classroom at golden hour. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair, long and slightly wavy, gathered into a loose side braid draped over her right shoulder, with soft bangs and warm rim light along the top of her head and hair edges. She wears a cream or light beige sailor-style school uniform with navy trim and a dark blue ribbon bow at the chest. Her pose is quiet and introspective: sitting at a school desk, leaning her cheek into one hand, shoulders slightly curved, looking off to the side with a tired but calm midweek expression. The scene is lit by strong late-afternoon sunlight pouring in from a tall classroom window on the right, creating glowing highlights, dust motes in the air, soft haze, and a nostalgic cinematic mood. In the dimmer left background, include a green classroom chalkboard and 2 small chalkboard erasers or chalk accessories resting on the tray. Use painterly anime realism with rich filmic contrast, delicate facial rendering, textured brushwork, subtle grain, and dramatic poster lighting. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the artwork: on the left side, large vertical white brush lettering reading "真ん中" with smaller handwritten-style vertical text above reading "やっと、"; across the lower middle, large pink calligraphic title text reading "水曜日" diagonally; on the upper right, a vertical tagline reading "週のまんなかで、わっと深呼吸ができる。" Near the lower right, include 3 stacked gold laurel award emblems with small Japanese text inside each. Along the bottom center, add 2 lines of small Japanese tagline text, then a credits block in small Japanese film-poster typography. In the bottom right corner, place a large release date reading {argument name="release date" default="5.29"} with "ROADSHOW" beneath it. Overall feeling: soft, melancholic, reassuring, like an understated coming-of-age film poster about an ordinary Wednesday becoming quietly special.
title: Cinematic Wednesday Anime Poster
description: This prompt generates a nostalgic Japanese film-poster illustration of a schoolgirl in a sunlit classroom, ideal for cinematic anime key art or social media poster visuals.

content: A satirical Spanish sports newspaper front page designed like a tabloid cover, full-frame and perfectly frontal, on slightly aged off-white newsprint with subtle paper texture, faint stains, and narrow black border lines. The masthead is a huge red SPORT logo across the top on a bright yellow banner. In the upper right, include 1 small interview promo box with a headshot of a footballer and the text block in Spanish: “ENTREVISTA CUBARSÍ ‘ESTOY PARA COSAS GRANDES’”. Under the masthead, add a yellow strip with bold black text “EXCLUSIVA MUNDIAL” and a small red lightning bolt. The main headline dominates the page in gigantic black condensed uppercase letters over 2 lines: “LAMILE FICHA POR LA PEÑA DEL BINGO”. Beneath it, add the subheadline in italic black Spanish text: “El crack pide dorsal el 10 y bocadillo de calamares en el contrato”. The main photo occupies the left-center and lower-middle of the page: a young footballer seen mostly from the back wearing a Barcelona home jersey in blue and garnet stripes, with the name “LAMILE” and the number “10” in large yellow lettering, standing in a celebratory stadium scene with confetti, bright lights, blurred fans, and people around him. He is holding or presenting a large bingo card board with the word “BINGO” at the top and “BINGO!” at the bottom. On the right side, create a vertical sidebar with 4 stacked content blocks: first, a photo of a calamari sandwich on a plate with the caption “El motivo del fichaje”; second, a red info box listing 3 humorous transfer facts in yellow and white text, exactly “EDAD: muy joven”, “FICHAJE: 4 cartones”, and “CLÁUSULA: una partida de parchís”; third, a quotes column with 3 stacked mini-items, each with a small portrait and Spanish caption: “XAVI: ‘No me lo esperaba, pero respeto’”, “LAPORTA: ‘Renegociaremos en el próximo bingo’”, and “EL VESTUARIO: Le preparan línea y bingo de bienvenida”; fourth, a small motorsport teaser at the bottom with a driver image and the text “FÓRMULA 1 ALONSO SUEÑA CON EL PODIO EN YEDA”. Along the bottom strip, include 3 small teaser panels: 1 woman footballer holding a trophy with the text “CHAMPIONS FEMENINA LA REINA AITANA QUIERE OTRA CORONA”, 1 basketball panel with two Barça players and the text “BÁSQUET EL BARÇA, A UN PAS DE LA FINAL FOUR”, and the Formula 1 teaser panel already integrated at the right edge. Add tiny newspaper metadata below the masthead on the left in Spanish, including issue number, date, and price, such as “Nº 16.743 MIÉRCOLES 22 DE ABRIL DE 2026 2,00 EUROS”. The overall style should be hyper-realistic printed newspaper cover photography and editorial layout, with authentic magazine typography, strong black headlines, saturated sports-photo colors, comedic transfer-rumor parody tone, and seamless believable print design.

description: This prompt generates a realistic parody sports newspaper cover in Spanish, ideal for humorous football transfer mockups and tabloid-style editorial images.

content: A surreal, ultra-detailed fantasy illustration of a large weathered human skull rising from dark water, centered in the frame, with the top of the skull opened like a pedestal supporting a giant transparent glass sphere. Inside the sphere stands an intricate luminous tree made of twisting golden branches and roots, with exactly 1 main trunk, dozens of tiny warm glowing orbs embedded among the branches, and many metallic bronze leaves. The roots spread across the base inside the globe and wrap around a small ladder built into the trunk. At the lower left inside the globe, depict exactly 1 translucent seated human figure in a contemplative pose, knees drawn up, head resting on one hand, holding a small glowing flower or crystalline bloom in the other hand. On the lower right inside the globe, include exactly 1 miniature architectural tower-like structure made of delicate gold framework. Surrounding the sphere and background are ornate branch networks with hanging crystal ornaments, faceted gemstones, suspended droplets, circular glass forms, and metallic leaves, all arranged symmetrically but organically. The skull is highly realistic with deep eye sockets, detailed teeth, cracked bone texture, and fine copper-like tubes and circuitry extending from both sides near the temples. In the skull’s right eye socket, show exactly 1 glowing mechanical orrery-like light structure. Place the whole composition in a dreamlike seascape at dusk with calm reflective water, distant rock spires, soft clouds, and a blue-to-gold sky. Use cinematic lighting, high contrast, sharp focus, mystical atmosphere, luxurious gold and bronze filigree, crystal transparency, and a color palette of deep teal, midnight blue, ivory bone, warm amber, and metallic gold. Make it feel like symbolic metacognition, consciousness contained within mortality, blending dark surrealism, baroque ornament, and ethereal sci-fi fantasy.
title: Surreal Skull and Tree of Consciousness
description: A richly detailed surreal fantasy artwork of a skull topped by a glass sphere containing a glowing golden tree and contemplative figure, ideal for concept art about consciousness, mortality, and dreamlike symbolism.

content: A bright, chaotic theatrical comedy movie poster in a polished Hollywood one-sheet style, vertical composition, with a retro yellow Mini Cooper speeding straight toward the viewer down a sunny palm-lined city street. The car is packed with exactly 5 vacationing friends: 2 visible in the front seats, 2 partially visible squeezed in the back, and 1 man sprawled on the roof luggage, pointing dramatically forward with a wild grin. Everyone wears colorful casual vacation clothes, including tropical prints, relaxed shirts, and sun hats. The scene feels loud, reckless, and fun. On the roof are stacked suitcases and travel bags. A police car with flashing lights chases from the rear right background. On the left side, a crooked wooden signpost has exactly 3 signs reading "BEACH", "MOUNTAINS", and "WHAT COULD GO WRONG?". A squawking seagull perches on top of the signpost. On the right side, a giant roadside donut shop sign reads "DONUT" and a folded paper map flies through the air. The street is full of motion blur, dust, debris, and tire energy, with a saturated blue sky and fluffy clouds above. At the very top, place exactly 4 actor names in black condensed caps: "DAVE JOHNSON", "LILY WANG", "KEVIN HARTLEY", and "AMY CHEN". Beneath that, add a stacked tagline in bold caps: "THEY CAME. THEY SAW." in dark navy, and "THEY MESSED EVERYTHING UP." in red. The main title dominates the upper middle in huge playful 3D typography: "{argument name="movie title" default="VACATION MODE"}", with "VACATION" in bright yellow and "MODE" in white, heavy blue shadowing, and the O replaced by a simple smiling face wearing sunglasses. Add small doodle-like yellow accent marks around the title. Across the lower right of the title, place a tilted hot-pink banner reading "A COMEDY ABOUT BAD IDEAS & GOOD TIMES" with a hand-drawn curved arrow pointing down. The car license plate reads "NO PLAN ALL FUN". Near the bottom, add a glowing pull-quote in yellow: "LAUGH-OUT-LOUD FUNNY!" and below it "- MOVIE BUZZ". At the bottom center, add the release line "ONLY IN THEATERS" and then "{argument name="release date" default="JUNE 20"}" in large bold yellow caps. Add tiny legal credits along the very bottom edge and small production logos in the corners, including "GOOD TIME FILMS" on the lower left and "NO PLAN ALL FUN" on the lower right. Use high-contrast lighting, exaggerated perspective, glossy commercial poster finish, vibrant summer colors, and a goofy road-trip comedy tone.

content:
A dramatic ultra-detailed vertical anime key visual poster showing a crossover war between Japan’s Sengoku era and China’s Three Kingdoms era, split exactly down the center by a glowing vertical beam of light. The left half is themed in crimson, magenta, ember orange, and cherry blossom pink, representing {argument name="left faction title" default="日本戦国"}; the right half is themed in jade green, teal, cyan, gold, and stormy blue, representing {argument name="right faction title" default="中国三国"}. At the center, large vertical Japanese calligraphy reads {argument name="center slogan" default="時空を越え、宿命が交錯する。"}. The composition is dense, cinematic, and symmetrical, like a premium game or movie crossover poster, with dozens of sparks, petals, glowing particles, motion streaks, and layered background architecture.

On the left side, depict 4 distinct Sengoku-themed warriors. At the top left, a stern samurai warlord in ornate black and deep red armor with gold trim, long dark hair tied high and blowing in the wind, shown in a powerful upper-body portrait facing inward; behind him are sakura blossoms, banners, and stacked Japanese castles illuminated with neon-magenta highlights. Mid-left, show 1 battle-hardened older general with wild silver hair, heavy layered armor, and a fierce glare, partially emerging from the fortress cityscape. Lower-left, show 1 aggressive crimson-clad warrior lunging forward with sweeping cloth, horned or antler-like helmet ornamentation, and dynamic red-black armor. At the bottom-left foreground, show 1 dominant swordsman in demonic samurai armor with a crescent-moon helmet crest and glowing red eyes, gripping a katana angled diagonally downward, surrounded by embers and petals. A vertical banner near the upper-left edge displays the Japanese text 日本戦国.

On the right side, depict 4 distinct Three Kingdoms-themed heroes. At the top right, show 1 regal strategist-emperor figure in elaborate blue, black, and gold ceremonial armor with a tall crown-like headdress, shown in upper-body profile facing inward; behind him rises a luminous spectral dragon made of water, cloud, and light. Mid-right, show 1 long-bearded green-robed general with a tall headpiece and lamellar armor, solemn and heroic, framed by neon-lit city structures and swirling magical energy. Slightly below center-right, show 1 elegant strategist-scholar holding an opened feather fan, wearing layered robes and gold ornaments, calm and calculating. At the lower-right edge, show 1 roaring armored warrior with a fierce expression and windblown hair. In the bottom-right foreground, make the dominant figure a green-and-gold armored hero extending a glowing jade-green sword toward the viewer, with flowing robes and luminous energy ribbons curling around the blade. A vertical banner near the upper-right edge displays the Chinese text 中国三国.

Blend historical East Asian war aesthetics with futuristic cyberpunk megacity elements: Japanese pagodas and fortresses on the left, neon skyscrapers and glowing urban lights across both halves, flying fortress silhouettes and distant airborne warships in the sky, magical lightning, smoke, and storm clouds overhead. The sky transitions from sunset violet and rose on the left to stormy turquoise and silver on the right. Use hyper-detailed painterly anime illustration, intricate armor textures, metallic reflections, volumetric lighting, high contrast, epic scale, and intense atmosphere.

At the bottom, add huge stylized title typography: on the left, massive fiery kanji 戦国 with the romanization SENGOKU beneath it; in the middle, a metallic gold VS; on the right, massive jade-glowing kanji 三国 with the romanization SANGOKU beneath it. Below that, add a smaller centered subtitle line reading SENGOKU VS SANGOKU, and beneath it a Japanese tagline: {argument name="bottom tagline" default="時空を超え、英雄たちの戦いが始まる。"}. Poster layout, polished commercial promotional art, extremely detailed, high-impact, collectible poster aesthetic.
title: Sengoku vs Sangoku Crossover Poster
description: A cinematic anime poster prompt for generating an epic crossover battle visual between Japanese Sengoku warlords and Chinese Three Kingdoms heroes.
