content: A premium e-commerce poster for fresh blueberries in a clean Chinese product-advertising style. Show a clear plastic clamshell box of blueberries as the main subject, placed diagonally from lower center to right side on folded blue fabric, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The package must remain realistic and consistent: a transparent square container with rounded corners, filled with dark blue blueberries, with a large irregular rounded label on top in white, pale blue, and deep blue, featuring one oversized blueberry illustration in the center and elegant Chinese branding. Make the fruit inside look larger, plumper, fresher, and covered with subtle moisture droplets, while keeping the overall blueberry arrangement believable. The background is an airy icy-blue tabletop with soft cloudy texture, cool daylight, and scattered loose blueberries around the package. Add a few blurred green leaves entering from the top right and bottom right edges for a fresh natural feeling. In the upper-right corner, include 1 small inset image showing the original product package from above on a warm brown surface, like a reference thumbnail. On the left side, create Chinese promotional typography with a large dark blue calligraphy headline {argument name="headline text" default="决茗新"}, followed by 2 smaller lines of copy: {argument name="subheadline text" default="新鲜蓝莓 自然之选"} and {argument name="tagline text" default="每一颗都是自然的礼物"}. Below that, place 3 vertically stacked feature icons with short Chinese captions: a leaf icon for natural ripeness, a fruit icon for juicy fullness, and a heart icon for rich nutrition. Near the bottom left, add large white brush-style Chinese text {argument name="product name" default="蓝莓"}, a secondary line {argument name="benefit text" default="膳食纤维+花青素"}, and a small net weight line reading 125克. Use cool blue color grading, crisp commercial lighting, sparkling highlights on the plastic lid, premium supermarket packaging aesthetics, high detail, realistic product photography blended with polished graphic design.
title: Premium Blueberry Product Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished Chinese-style e-commerce advertisement for packaged blueberries, suitable for supermarket branding, product listings, and promotional posters.

content: Eye-level view, looking straight at a high-saturation 3D multi-layered paper carving scene. The overall colors are grayish-blue, creamy white, and deep forest green, accented with amber warm light. All elements must be physical paper layered structures, with hard-cut edges and clearly visible thick paper cross-sections. Extremely rich composition, a high-energy {argument name="scene theme" default="pirate group scene"} set in a chaotic sea adventure. Multiple stylized pirate characters are presented in exaggerated actions, with a {argument name="core character" default="young captain wearing a straw hat"} in the middle layer charging forward, surrounded by crew members with distinct poses. Layered ships, surging waves, and swirling currents run through the foreground, middle, and background, with multiple ships colliding and tilting in different spatial layers, sails torn, and flags flying. Silhouettes of giant opposing characters appear in the background layer to enhance the sense of oppression and spatial hierarchy. The foreground is filled with narrative elements: treasure chests, gold coins, maps, barrels, ropes, lanterns, and a wanted poster with a smiling pirate. A mascot-like small character is placed in the corner as a visual anchor. All atmospheric elements are presented in paper carving form: waves, splashes, smoke, debris, and movement lines, strengthening the chaos and sense of motion. The main subject is in the middle layer, with elements interacting across layers to express movement through overlap and spatial relationships. Soft light from a single direction creates clear inter-layer shadows. Overall matte paper texture, no glowing, no soft edges, no volumetric light. Octane render, 8K, clear details --ar 3:4 --stylize 450
title: 3D Papercut Pirate Scene
description: A detailed prompt for creating a high-saturation 3D multi-layered papercut scene featuring a stylized pirate crew in a chaotic sea adventure, complete with octane rendering and realistic paper textures.

content: A smartphone screenshot of an AI chat app interface in portrait orientation, showing a clean white iOS-style screen with a top bar containing a hamburger menu on the left, the blue title “Thinking” with a small chevron, and two icons on the right for compose and more options. Near the top is a rounded light-gray user message bubble in Japanese reading “Attention機構を人体に喩えて細かくラベルを付けて。医学書の精緻な挿絵風に。” Below it, faint gray system text reads “Thought for 5s” and “画像が作成されました”. The lower half of the screen displays the generated image as a detailed medical textbook-style anatomical poster. The poster shows a realistic three-quarter back view of an adult woman from head to upper thighs, with her head turned slightly left and her dark brown hair tied into a messy bun. Her skin and outer tissues are removed across most of the body to reveal musculature, nerves, blood vessels, and fibrous structures, rendered in extremely detailed vintage medical illustration style on a warm cream paper background. A rectangular cutout obscures the center of the face from forehead to jaw, creating a censored blank block over the facial area. Fine glowing network lines and nodes are overlaid through the exposed brain and body to visualize the attention mechanism as if it were an anatomical system. Surrounding the figure are 6 numbered explanatory panels and 2 additional text blocks, all densely filled with Japanese and English bilingual labels, formulas, arrows, and diagrams. The main poster title at upper left is “アテンション機構の解剖学的構造” with the English subtitle “The Anatomy of the Attention Mechanism”. At the top right is a flowchart labeled “Overall Flow of Attention” containing 5 connected boxes describing the process from input to output. Down the left side are 3 stacked explanatory sections with equations and mapping tables. Down the right side are 3 more numbered sections, each with technical notes and a small chart or matrix; the visible mini-diagrams include 1 purple heatmap matrix, 1 blue bar chart, and 1 multicolored cube graphic. Along the bottom edge are 5 small brain inset illustrations with captions showing stages of information flow. The overall aesthetic should feel like a highly polished AI-generated screenshot documenting a surreal scientific illustration request, with crisp UI, lots of tiny readable labels, and a convincing fusion of transformer attention diagrams and classical anatomical plate design.
title: AI Chat Screenshot with Anatomy Poster
description: A realistic smartphone chat-app screenshot showing a Japanese prompt and the resulting dense medical-style anatomical infographic, ideal for recreating viral AI image demo posts.

content: A dark monochrome manga-style horror illustration on a pure black background, in a tall vertical poster composition. Centered at the bottom is a small lonely teenage boy with messy short dark hair, sitting on the ground with his knees pulled to his chest and his arms wrapped around them, head slightly bowed, conveying fear, isolation, and helplessness. Towering over him is a gigantic biomechanical demon or armored monster head descending from above, with a long angular skull-like face, sharp chin, narrow hollow eye sockets, layered helmet-like plates, and a jagged open mouth. Surrounding the boy are exactly 2 enormous skeletal clawed hands, one on the left and one on the right, framing him like a cage; each hand has long segmented metallic fingers ending in sharp pointed tips, bent inward menacingly. Render everything in rough scratchy white ink linework and heavy crosshatching against deep black, with intense high-contrast seinen manga energy. Add vivid neon purple paint-like liquid in splashes and long dripping streaks from the monster’s face, the hands, and the ground, pooling around the boy for the only strong color accent. On the upper right side, add vertical Japanese text reading 逃げちゃダメだ, and beneath it in small white English text: EGO BORDER: ACTIVE. The mood is oppressive, psychological, claustrophobic, and nightmarish, like a dark anime poster about inner fear and mental collapse.
title: Dark Manga Monster Poster
description: This prompt generates a high-contrast psychological horror anime poster with a small frightened boy trapped beneath a giant skeletal biomechanical monster, ideal for dramatic cover art or dark character-themed visuals.

content: A gritty vertical anime-mecha poster in distressed screen-print style, inspired by retro military dossiers and Evangelion key art. The main subject is a massive close-up side profile of {argument name="mecha unit name" default="EVANGELION: UNIT-01"}, dominating the right two-thirds of the composition, facing left with its jaws open in a feral scream. The head is angular and biomechanical, with deep purple armor, olive-green accent plates, black metal inner structures, a single long horn projecting diagonally upward to the left, sharp teeth, and a narrow glowing eye. The surface is scratched, chipped, weathered, and inked with heavy comic-style linework. Behind it is a dark navy blueprint background filled with 8 visible technical diagram clusters, white schematic lines, anatomical overlays, cross-sections, labels, measurement marks, and interface graphics. A violent red paint slash explodes diagonally across the upper center and left side, with additional red drips running downward from the mecha’s mouth area. In the lower left corner, 1 small human figure sits hunched on a gray equipment crate: a teenage boy in a short-sleeve white school shirt, dark pants, and white sneakers, elbows on knees, looking down at a glowing handheld device, conveying isolation and anxiety. Add layered poster typography and warning graphics throughout the border: a torn yellow caution sign in the upper right with Japanese warning text and “CAUTION NERV ONLY”; a tall left sidebar with “01”, barcode-like blocks, hazard icons, and red-black labels; large distressed white kanji vertically stacked over the mecha torso; the word {argument name="main title" default="ESCAPE"} in spaced red capitals beneath the kanji; a small black label reading “PILOT: {argument name="pilot name" default="IKARI, SHINJI"}”; a bottom-right NERV logo; and footer text such as classified file markings and top secret stamps. Include 6 clearly readable English technical labels in the blueprint area: “TEST TYPE”, “BIOLOGICAL CONSTRAINT”, “AT FIELD”, “MAGI SYSTEM”, “INTERNAL”, and “CLASSIFIED MATERIAL”. Add Japanese dossier text blocks as authentic graphic texture. The palette is limited to dark indigo, black, crimson red, purple, olive green, dirty beige, and off-white. High contrast, torn-paper collage details, halftone texture, ink splatter, cracked paint, and worn print edges. Cinematic, oppressive, chaotic, collectible poster design, ultra-detailed, sharp, textured, no clean modern polish.
title: Gritty Evangelion Unit-01 Poster
description: This generates a distressed anime-mecha poster featuring a screaming purple biomechanical unit, blueprint overlays, warning graphics, and a small seated pilot figure for collectible print or cover-art use.

content: A dramatic vertical close-up of a roaring cosmic dragon head in side profile, painted in a violent ink-splatter and brushstroke style on a stark white background. The creature has a long sharp horn, angular armored facial plates, a glowing white-green eye, and a huge open mouth lined with jagged teeth. Inside the mouth and throat, instead of flesh, there is a swirling galaxy-like void of luminous {argument name="energy color" default="violet"} and magenta nebula light, with sparkling stars and dust erupting outward like cosmic fire. The dragon’s body is mostly black and deep indigo with glossy highlights, accented by iridescent emerald reflections along the neck and scales. Use expressive high-contrast sumi-e-inspired strokes, splattered paint textures, torn abstract edges, and explosive particle effects concentrated around the eye, mouth, and upper head. Composition should fill the frame with the head tilted upward in a feral scream, cropped tightly for maximum intensity, with no environment and no extra subjects, just raw abstract energy, ink, and celestial debris.
title: Cosmic Ink Dragon Roar
description: A high-contrast fantasy illustration prompt for generating a fierce close-up dragon portrait with galaxy energy effects and expressive ink-splatter styling.

content: A photorealistic Japanese izakaya advertisement poster in a warm, cinematic night-time mood, designed like a street-front restaurant flyer. The composition is vertical and densely layered. On the right side, a young Japanese woman with long straight dark brown to black hair, wearing a fitted black ribbed turtleneck sweater, stands from the waist up and holds a large frosty glass mug of golden highball with visible ice cubes in her right hand near chest level. Her pose is relaxed and inviting, looking toward the camera, with a soft nightlife ambiance. The background is a narrow traditional izakaya exterior or interior alley scene filled with warm orange lantern light, shallow depth of field, hanging wooden menu plaques with handwritten Japanese calligraphy, and a nostalgic bustling-after-work atmosphere. In the upper left, a large weathered dark wooden signboard dominates the design, with bold white brushstroke kanji reading 蓮華食堂, small hiragana above it reading れんげしょくどう, and a red brush-painted banner beneath reading 大衆居酒屋. Below that on the left-center, place a large cream-colored paper or painted panel featuring the drink special in oversized calligraphic typography: ハイボール above a huge red 198円, with small black（税込） beside the price, the numerals painted in energetic brush style. Along the far right edge, add vertical white Japanese text reading 今日も一日、おかれさまです。 Near the lower right over the woman’s torso, place a red circular stamp-like badge with white handwritten text arranged diagonally and vertically: 旨い！安い！居心地◎. Across the bottom foreground, show exactly 4 plated menu items lined up side by side on rustic ceramic dishes: 1) two glazed grilled chicken skewers with char marks, labeled 焼き鳥 盛り合わせ and priced 580円; 2) a sashimi assortment with slices of tuna, salmon, white fish, shiso leaves and wasabi, labeled お刺身 盛り合わせ and priced 780円; 3) a plate of fried chicken karaage pieces with a lemon wedge, labeled 若鶏の唐揚げ and priced 480円; 4) sliced rolled dashi omelet topped with chopped green onion and served with grated daikon, labeled 出汁巻き玉子 and priced 380円. At the bottom left, include a glowing red paper lantern graphic with black vertical text 居酒屋. Across the bottom center on a dark band, add large bold white brush lettering reading でかい！うまい！安い！ and below it smaller white text reading みんなの憩いの場、蓮華食堂へようこそ！ Add a decorative red lotus-like emblem near the top sign and another matching emblem in the bottom right corner. Use rich amber highlights, strong contrast, glossy food styling, realistic skin and drink textures, commercial poster polish, and a nostalgic Showa-inspired izakaya promotion aesthetic.
title: Japanese Izakaya Highball Poster
description: This generates a photorealistic Japanese izakaya promotional poster featuring a woman holding a highball, bold pricing text, and four featured dishes for restaurant advertising or nightlife-themed visuals.

content: Create a glossy Chinese co-branded beverage poster advertisement in a bold commercial style, vertical 4:5 composition, with a dramatic split-color background: bright saturated red on the left and vivid royal blue on the right, blended at the center with radiant streaks, motion lines, glow effects, and high-energy product-launch lighting. At the top, place 2 brand logo areas separated by a white multiplication sign: on the upper left, a snowman mascot logo with Chinese text {argument name="left brand name" default="蜜雪冰城"} and smaller subtitle text "始于1997冰淇淋与茶"; on the upper right, the deer logo and wordmark {argument name="right brand name" default="luckin coffee"} with smaller Chinese subtitle "专业咖啡新鲜式". Centered beneath the logos, add a huge Chinese headline in thick 3D extruded display typography with white faces, colored edging, heavy shadows, and a glossy embossed look, reading {argument name="headline text" default="蜜雪冰城 × 瑞幸咖啡"}, with the left half accented red and the right half accented blue. Below it, add a second slogan line in bold Chinese text, split by brand color, reading "冰爽甜蜜，咖啡加倍", flanked by short horizontal white dashes. Under that, place a rounded capsule banner in red-to-blue gradient containing the Chinese text "双品牌联名主打・人气招牌同框". In the center foreground, show 2 hero products: on the left, 1 vanilla soft-serve ice cream in a waffle cone, tall swirl, creamy white, slightly glossy, wrapped in a bright red cone sleeve printed with the snowman mascot and Chinese branding; on the right, 1 large clear plastic cup of iced latte or coffee with visible ice cubes, caramel-brown liquid marbling into milk, condensation droplets on the cup, a transparent lid, the blue deer logo, the wordmark "luckin coffee", and small Chinese subtitle text. Surround the cup with dynamic coffee splash arcs and exactly 3 flying coffee beans. Around the lower foreground, add scattered translucent ice cubes and white milk splashes to emphasize cold freshness. Include exactly 2 comic-style promotional burst badges: a red circular badge on the left reading "联名新品" and a blue circular badge on the right reading "限时热卖". In the bottom left corner, add 1 cute 3D snowman mascot character wearing a red cape and holding a tiny ice cream cone, smiling and winking. At the bottom center, place a large red-and-blue beveled ribbon banner with bold white Chinese text reading "今夏限定 立即尝鲜", ending with a yellow lightning bolt icon on the right. Along the very bottom edge, place 3 small selling-point items separated by vertical dividers: a snowflake icon with "冰爽甜蜜", a coffee bean icon with "咖啡加倍", and a heart icon with "双倍满足". Use premium e-commerce poster rendering, ultra-clean product retouching, glossy highlights, rich contrast, crisp Chinese typography, depth, reflections, splash effects, and an energetic summer limited-edition campaign aesthetic.
title: Chinese Co-Branded Summer Drink Poster
description: A high-impact vertical Chinese advertising poster for a limited-time ice cream and coffee collaboration, suitable for brand campaigns, social ads, and product launch visuals.

content: Create a bright pastel anime promotional poster for a fictional slice-of-life comedy series. The composition is a single-page Japanese key visual with one central heroine surrounded by 5 inset moments and blocks of Japanese promotional text, like an anime announcement poster. The main character is {argument name="character name" default="もち子さん"}, a cute anime girl with short white hair fading slightly to silver, large vivid blue eyes, soft blush, and twin low ponytails tied near the shoulders. She wears an oversized black hood shaped like floppy dog ears, round silver goggles resting on top of her head, a black choker with a metallic round ornament, a futuristic white-and-black cropped sleeveless top with dark trim and a small emblem on the chest, detached black arm sleeves, very short white shorts with black edging, a thigh strap on one leg, and a small side pouch on her hip. Her body proportions are youthful anime stylization with a slim, petite build and slightly exaggerated chest, rendered in polished modern moe character design. In the center she stands full body, smiling gently and holding a pen in one hand as if she is about to make a mistake while writing, facing the viewer in a confident but sweet pose. Around her place 5 supporting vignette images of the same character: 1) upper left, a chibi-style scene of her outside with both hands thrown forward, crying dramatically with a huge open mouth; 2) lower left, a comic scene of her collapsed face-down on a desk or floor with scattered papers, exhausted and flustered; 3) upper right, a bust shot where she holds up a paper sign with Japanese writing, looking apologetic; 4) lower right, a cheerful half-body portrait with closed smiling eyes and one fist raised in encouragement; 5) a small background portrait in the top-right area behind text, used like a character callout. Include exactly 2 small white mascot creatures near the bottom center, both round and mochi-like with tiny dot eyes and tiny mouths, one larger and one smaller, floating or standing beside the heroine. Use a soft spring palette with pink, sky blue, mint green, peach, cream, and white, with scattered cherry blossom petals and rounded graphic shapes in the background. The background should feel airy and celebratory, with subtle outdoor scenery blur and decorative swooshes, stars, and bubbles. Fill the poster with Japanese typography in a playful commercial-anime style: a large multicolored title at top left, small header text above it, a red seasonal broadcast announcement, a pink "あらすじ" synopsis box on the left with several lines of body text, a blue explanatory box at bottom left, vertical and angled exclamatory phrases around the character, and a pink production-credit block at bottom right. Add a prominent character name banner in the upper right. Keep all text looking like authentic printed Japanese promotional copy, using rounded colorful fonts for the title and clean magazine-style fonts for the smaller text. Overall mood: adorable, comedic, slightly chaotic, professionally designed anime key art for a new TV series announcement in 16:9 landscape format.
title: Pastel Anime Promo Poster
description: A colorful Japanese anime announcement poster featuring a white-haired mascot girl with multiple comedic inset scenes, ideal for recreating TV-series key visuals or parody promotional art.

content: A dramatic Japanese food advertisement poster for a premium pork rice bowl, vertical composition, black and fiery orange background with glowing embers, smoke, and a high-contrast gourmet marketing look. The main focus is an oversized bowl of butadon in the lower center, filled with white rice and topped with many thick slices of glossy grilled pork belly, richly lacquered with dark sweet soy glaze, visible char marks, caramelized edges, and a stream of sauce pouring down from above onto the meat. Make the food look hyper-appetizing, juicy, rich, and slightly exaggerated like a restaurant flyer. Large bold brushed gold Japanese headline text dominates the upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="帯広の肉厚豚丼"}. Across the middle, a gold paint-stroke banner contains black Japanese text: {argument name="subheadline text" default="極上の炭火焼き。極上のタレ。"}. On the right side, add a cute anime girl mascot standing behind the bowl, about half-body visible, wearing a black-and-white cow-themed hoodie with small horns, long blonde hair, frilly sleeves, and a shy delighted pose with one hand near her mouth; keep her face intentionally obscured by a plain beige rectangle censor block. Add vertical white Japanese copy along the right edge in 2 separate text groups: 1 at the upper right, 1 larger at the mid-to-lower right. Add a small handwritten-style white note near the girl with a tiny heart. In the lower left, include a dark circular callout badge with gold rim and white/yellow Japanese text about charcoal grilling and flavor. Along the very bottom, place 3 circular ingredient-feature icons with exact labels beneath them: raw pork slices labeled {argument name="feature label 1" default="肉厚!"}, glowing charcoal embers labeled {argument name="feature label 2" default="炭火焼き!"}, and glossy dark sauce labeled {argument name="feature label 3" default="極上ダレ!"}. At the bottom right, add a huge energetic gold brush-calligraphy slogan with splattered paint effects, plus a smaller white sentence beneath it. Use intense lighting, glossy highlights, premium yakiniku flyer aesthetics, dense Japanese typography, bold brush fonts, and a mouthwatering late-night food terror vibe.
title: Fiery Butadon Japanese Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a dramatic Japanese restaurant-style flyer for a thick-cut charcoal-grilled pork bowl, ideal for food promotions, social posts, or menu advertising.

content: Create a dramatic vertical dark-fantasy poster in a Minecraft-inspired voxel style, like an epic movie or game cover. At the very top, place a large ornate metallic-gold blackletter title reading {argument name="headline text" default="[Heliocore.C6]"}, with a smaller elegant serif subtitle beneath it reading {argument name="subtitle" default="The Final Convergence"}. The main scene shows 1 massive Ender Dragon made of black cubic blocks, flying forward and downward out of the sky with its wings spread wide, mouth open, glowing purple eyes, and violet energy in its throat, while chunks of voxel debris break apart around its body. Behind the dragon, place 3 large concentric glowing magic circles with arcane runes and geometric symbols in pale gold light, centered in the sky like a summoning seal. In the foreground, show 1 blocky hero seen from behind, resembling Steve, standing on a ruined stone staircase-throne and raising 1 glowing purple enchanted sword toward the dragon. Surround the platform with 4 visible Endermen total, tall and slender with black blocky bodies and glowing purple eyes, acting as ominous witnesses. The environment is an enormous ruined End-city style abyss with towering broken pillars, floating block fragments, crystal clusters, and distant structures fading into purple fog. Use a palette of black, charcoal, deep violet, magenta glow, and antique gold highlights, with cinematic volumetric lighting, heavy atmosphere, sparks, dust, magical particles, extreme scale, high contrast, and a polished ultra-detailed poster composition.

content: A vintage socialist propaganda poster in a mid-20th-century Chinese style, printed on aged paper with a warm sepia tint, distressed texture, faded ink, and slightly worn edges. The composition is vertical and heroic. On the right half of the poster, show a large waist-up portrait of a male worker or revolutionary figure wearing a dark cap and a dark utilitarian jacket, facing slightly to the left with a stoic, determined expression. On the left-center, a white reusable rocket rises upward with bright engine flame, depicted like an aspirational symbol of technological progress; the rocket has the word "SPACEX" written vertically on its body and visible landing legs near the base. Behind the rocket, fill the sky with dramatic cream-colored sunburst rays spreading outward across a muted blue background. In the lower left, include a cheering crowd of exactly 6 factory workers or citizens in blue-gray uniforms, raising their hands in celebration, with one large red flag waving beside them. Add faint industrial city elements and launch-tower silhouettes behind the crowd. At the bottom, reserve a wide text panel with large bold red Chinese slogan lettering in two lines reading: "今天回收火箭，明天建设星际家园！". Use a screen-printed poster look, painterly realism, limited palette of dusty blue, cream, brick red, and dark olive, with strong ideological poster composition, triumphant mood, and retro-futurist space-race symbolism.
title: Vintage Chinese SpaceX Propaganda Poster
description: This prompt generates a retro Chinese-style propaganda poster featuring a SpaceX rocket, a heroic worker portrait, and a bold slogan, suitable for satirical political art or retro-futurist design.

content: A Japanese theatrical romance movie poster in a tall smartphone-style vertical layout with rounded corners, designed like a polished anime key visual. The main image shows a beautiful teenage billboard girl heroine standing on an outdoor balcony at dusk, turning back over her shoulder to look at the viewer with a soft, wistful expression. She has very long silver-white twin-tail hair tied with dark ribbons, pale skin, and large pink-violet eyes. She wears a delicate white frilled blouse with voluminous sleeves and a dark high-waisted dress or corset-like skirt, creating an elegant, slightly gothic school-romance look. The atmosphere is dreamy and emotional, filled with glowing bokeh lights, drifting petals or snow-like sparkles, sunset pink and lavender light, and a luminous cityscape in the blurred background. Use rich cinematic anime rendering, ultra-detailed hair strands, soft rim light, glossy eyes, and a bittersweet first-love mood. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the composition: a large vertical pink poetic tagline on the right, a vertical white tagline on the left, a very large main title near the lower left reading {argument name="title text" default="看板娘"}, and a smaller subtitle beside it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="君と紡ぐ恋物語"}. Include 5 small rectangular film-strip preview stills aligned across the lower middle, each showing the same heroine in different emotional close-ups. Add dense credits, festival-style laurels, and small release information at the top and bottom in Japanese, with the overall feel of a premium romance anime film poster advertising a tragic, beautiful love story. Use a pastel palette of mauve, blush pink, violet, pearl white, and midnight navy, with soft bloom, shallow depth of field, and elegant poster composition.
title: Anime Romance Movie Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese anime-style theatrical poster for a bittersweet romance film, ideal for cinematic key art, mock movie ads, or dramatic character-focused poster design.

content: A dark, cinematic anime-horror key visual in a vertical poster composition, set at night inside or beside a shattered window with a huge glowing full moon dominating the background. In the center foreground, a young couple stands in an intimate embrace. The male figure is tall and slim, wearing a dark brown or charcoal hoodie with the hood up, white drawstrings, subtle red blood-like stains on the sleeve and lower hem, and dark red pants. His skin is pale, his long black hair falls over one eye, and the lower half of his face is wrapped in dirty white bandages stained with blood, giving him a disturbing but protective antihero presence. One hand and wrist are also wrapped in bandages. He looks slightly upward and away with a solemn, haunted expression while holding the girl around her back. The female figure is petite with extremely long straight platinum-blonde hair reaching past her waist, wearing a loose white coat or cardigan over a black-and-white outfit and a black choker. She faces him closely with both hands clasped together against his chest, creating a tender contrast against the horror atmosphere. Add 2 ghostly supporting figures in the background: on the left, a pale blonde girl in shadow wearing striped clothing and holding an object close to her chest; on the right, a hooded male figure in profile with glasses or sharp facial lines, his hood marked by a dark blood stain. The environment is filled with floating shards of broken glass, blue moonlight, dust motes, and star-like particles, with deep navy, black, and icy blue tones throughout. Place a stylized red Japanese title at the top right, {argument name="headline text" default="殺戮の天使"}, with a smaller red serif English subtitle beneath it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="Memory Collection"}. Make the overall style a polished live-action cosplay poster blended with anime horror cover art, highly detailed, dramatic rim lighting, glossy fabric textures, supernatural atmosphere, tragic romance mood, and a premium game or visual novel promotional aesthetic.
title: Moonlit Anime Horror Cosplay Poster
description: This prompt generates a dramatic vertical anime-horror promotional poster with a moonlit couple, two shadowy background figures, and a dark supernatural romance atmosphere.

content: A vertical anime-inspired wedding key visual poster that blends live-action cosplay-style newlyweds in the foreground with illustrated anime girls surrounding them, set in front of a sunlit stone church under a brilliant deep blue sky. In the center foreground, a bride and groom pose for a dramatic selfie-like shot with their arms reaching toward the viewer. The groom is a youthful androgynous character with {argument name="hair color" default="light brown"} shaggy short hair, wearing a crisp white wedding suit, white shirt, and white tie, smiling and making a playful hand sign near his face. The bride has {argument name="hair color" default="dark purple-black"} hair in short twin tails and wears an ornate white wedding dress with layered lace, veil, pearl choker, long white gloves, and holds a bouquet of white roses. Behind them rises a beautiful European-style church with a tall steeple, floral garlands over the entrance, stained glass, and warm sunlight bursting from the left side, creating lens flare and sparkling highlights. The sky is filled with fluffy white clouds, flying white birds, a faint rainbow streak, and drifting pink flower petals. Around the edges are 6 anime schoolgirl portraits in dark school uniforms with red or yellow ribbon bows, each showing a different emotional expression: top left brown-haired girl reaching forward, upper left purple-haired girl with an eyepatch looking flustered, lower left pink-haired cheerful girl, top right brown-haired girl extending a gloved hand, mid-right dark-haired boy in school uniform, lower right brown-haired shy girl, and bottom right small blonde girl with an excited open-mouth expression. Add ornate decorative corner filigree framing the poster. Include vertical Japanese tagline text on the upper right reading {argument name="tagline text" default="さあ、契約の時間だ— 私たちの永遠を誓おう"}. Place a large colorful Japanese title across the bottom center reading {argument name="title text" default="中二病でも恋がしたい！"} in bold blue and pink outlined typography, with a small romanized subtitle beneath it reading "Chu-2 byo demo KOI ga shitai!" and small credits near the bottom reading {argument name="credit text" default="富樫勇太　小鳥遊六花"}. Overall look: dazzling, romantic, sentimental, nostalgic anime movie poster, ultra-detailed, glossy lighting, magical sparkle effects, vivid colors, polished promotional composition.
title: Anime Wedding Poster at a Church
description: A dramatic anime-style wedding poster featuring a bride and groom before a flower-decorated church, ideal for recreating a romantic light-novel or anime promotional visual.

content: A cinematic waist-up portrait of a refined woman in an old-fashioned library, turned slightly to the left and seated or standing close to the camera, with her face centered and partly in soft shadow. She has {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} hair styled in an elegant Edwardian or early 20th-century updo with volume at the crown and loose curled strands framing the sides. She wears a high-necked {argument name="dress color" default="cream-gold"} lace dress with intricate floral texture and delicate trim, plus one visible dangling earring. The setting is a warm, intimate study with 2 tall wooden bookcases filled with aged books in brown, green, and muted blue tones, and on the far left a softly glowing window with a sheer curtain beside 1 framed wall picture. Use golden-hour indoor lighting, amber highlights, shallow depth of field, rich wood tones, soft filmic contrast, realistic skin and fabric detail, and a quiet historical-drama mood. Compose it in a 16:9 frame, medium close-up, photorealistic, luxurious, subtle, and painterly without looking illustrated.
title: Cinematic Woman in Vintage Library
description: This prompt generates a warm 16:9 photorealistic period-style portrait of an elegant woman in a book-lined study, suitable for historical drama visuals or cinematic character art.

content: A hyper-detailed premium collectible trading card illustration of {argument name="hero name" default="Kamen Rider Decade"} in the center foreground, posed in a ruined futuristic city battlefield under a dramatic cosmic night sky. The armored hero wears a glossy magenta, black, and white suit with a segmented helmet and large luminous green compound eyes, facing the viewer in a powerful stance. One arm is thrust forward toward the camera, holding up a character card between black gloved fingers so the card is clearly visible in forced perspective; the other hand gives a confident thumbs-up. The belt device is prominent at the waist. Surrounding the hero are exactly 8 secondary figures and monsters scattered through the rubble and midair battle scene: 1 blue-and-red armored rider crouching in the bottom left foreground, 1 red-and-gold armored rider on the right midground, 2 small rider figures in the distant center background, 2 flying figures in the upper background, and 2 monstrous enemy creatures on the right side, one mid-right and one bottom-right. The environment is dense with collapsed buildings, broken concrete, sparks, smoke, debris, and cinematic action lighting. Render the whole image as a luxurious holographic SSR card with an ornate prismatic foil border, glittering rainbow refractions, metallic gold filigree framing, and layered collectible-card UI. At the top center, large embossed title text reads {argument name="title text" default="KAMEN RIDER DECADE"}, with smaller text above reading "MASKED RIDER". In the top right is a large metallic badge reading {argument name="rarity label" default="SSR"} with 5 gold stars beneath it. In the top left and bottom right are 2 circular magenta crest icons. In the lower center is a gold cursive signature reading {argument name="signature text" default="NickZág"}. Along the bottom frame are 4 labeled UI sections: left panel "CARD TYPE" over "CHARACTER", center nameplate "KAMEN RIDER DECADE" with Japanese subtitle "仮面ライダーディケイド", a barcode panel beneath, and right panel "RARITY" over "SSR". Add tiny footer text under the barcode reading {argument name="footer text" default="DECADE COMPLETE 21"}. Style: ultra-detailed tokusatsu hero art, cinematic photoreal armor textures, dramatic depth, explosive action composition, premium gacha card design, holographic foil print effects, sharp focus on the main hero and card, highly polished game-card promotional artwork.
title: Holographic Kamen Rider Decade SSR Card
description: This prompt generates a premium holographic tokusatsu trading card featuring Kamen Rider Decade in a dramatic battle scene, ideal for collectible card art, poster designs, or gacha-style character promos.

content: A whimsical studio portrait of 3 stylized chickens made entirely from layered flower petals and blossoms, standing side by side against a plain light gray background with soft even lighting and faint ground shadows. The left chicken is cream and ivory colored, built from pale petals and small white wildflowers, with a surprised expression, very large round googly eyes, a small pale comb, drooping pink wattles, and thin yellow chicken legs. The center chicken is fluffy and round, made from dense pink petals and pink flowers in multiple shades, with a stern slightly grumpy expression, narrowed eyes, a larger pale beak, oversized pink wattles, and a floppy pink flower-like comb falling over its forehead. The right chicken is bright orange and golden, made from vivid orange petals and marigold-like blooms with a few green leaves and yellow sprigs, with a sleepy unimpressed expression, half-lidded eyes, a tall red-orange comb, red wattles, and yellow legs. Make all 3 birds highly detailed, cute, quirky, and handcrafted-looking, with realistic floral textures arranged into convincing chicken anatomy, centered composition, full-body view, clean minimal backdrop, and a polished fantasy editorial photograph aesthetic.
title: Floral Chickens Trio Portrait
description: This prompt generates a cute high-detail studio image of three flower-constructed chickens, ideal for whimsical character art or decorative fantasy animal imagery.

content: A dramatic vertical dark-fantasy anime key visual poster for the RPG {argument name="game title" default="夢喰-BAKU-"}. Center the composition around 3 human figures layered in depth. In the background, a large intimidating adult man is shown from the chest up, facing forward, with messy wavy dark hair, light stubble, a partially open dark shirt, and a shadowed, ominous presence; his face is mostly obscured by darkness and framing, making him feel mysterious and threatening. In the foreground left, place 1 young man in a dynamic three-quarter pose lunging toward the viewer with his right hand stretched out dramatically, wearing a blue jacket over a white hoodie, with short tousled brown hair and a determined expression. In the foreground right, place 1 young woman standing slightly behind him, with long brown hair, a pale blouse, and a dark skirt or high-waisted bottom with a belt; she clasps her hands near her mouth or chest and looks anxious and vulnerable. Use a moody supernatural atmosphere with swirling black and deep violet smoke, ink-like shadows, spectral textures, and pixel-glitch fragments around the edges. Add broken chains diagonally in the background, several floating rectangular frames or screens, and a faint interior corridor or room behind the characters. Integrate the large Japanese title {argument name="title text" default="夢喰"} vertically in the center, rendered in bold white calligraphic kanji with purple splatter, scratches, and glow accents, partially overlapping the characters. At the bottom, include the Japanese tagline {argument name="tagline text" default="分かるだろ？俺達が必要とされる理由がよ"} in elegant white text with part of the sentence highlighted in purple. In the top right corner, add a white studio logo reading {argument name="logo text" default="DCC Project"} with a lotus-like emblem and large serif letters. Overall style: polished illustrated key art for a psychological horror RPG, ultra-detailed anime painting, high contrast, cinematic lighting, deep blacks, indigo and violet palette, ominous supernatural energy, poster-ready typography, premium promotional visual.
title: Dark Fantasy RPG Key Visual Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style vertical key visual for a psychological horror RPG, suitable for game promotion, title screens, and social media announcements.

content: A dramatic vertical sci-fi key visual poster for a dark space opera game, featuring a single colossal alien-mechanical spacecraft centered slightly low in the frame, angled diagonally from lower left toward upper right as if surging forward through space. The ship is razor-sharp, asymmetrical, and aggressively organic, built from layered black metal and glowing crimson-red armor plates, with a long spear-like prow, many jagged fins, and about 12 to 16 whip-like tendrils or spines streaming backward from its upper rear like biomechanical hair. Behind it floats a large shadowed planet at center, encircled by 3 luminous red orbital rings that create a halo effect. At upper left, include 1 cratered moon or planet partially cropped by the frame. Scatter multiple dark asteroids and rocky debris across the foreground and edges, especially lower right and lower left, to create depth. The background is a dense starfield with red nebula clouds and streaks of fiery cosmic dust. In the upper right, place a blazing orange-white sun flare breaking into the scene, casting hot rim light across the ship and rings. Use a high-contrast palette of black, deep crimson, ember red, and white highlights, with glossy metallic reflections and a grim, apocalyptic mood. Add vertical Japanese tagline text on the right side in white Mincho-style serif characters: 「あの太陽に飛び込めば 冷めきった私の心も温かくなるのだろうか」. At the bottom center, add the main title in very large distressed white Japanese serif characters with cracked texture and subtle red glow: 「斑鳩の柩」. Beneath it, add 1 line of smaller red katakana subtitle text: 「イカルガのクルスー」, and beneath that 1 line of small Roman letters in red: "IKARUGA NO CRUX". Make it look like premium anime game key art, cinematic poster composition, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, dynamic lighting, epic scale, ominous and beautiful.
title: Crimson Space Opera Key Visual
description: A dark, cinematic sci-fi game poster showing a red-black biomechanical starship against planets, glowing orbital rings, and Japanese title typography, ideal for key visual or cover art generation.

content: Using the provided reference image of the udon meal, turn it into a clean, print-ready Japanese restaurant promotional poster while keeping the food photo itself as the main hero image. Expand the composition vertically into a portrait flyer layout, add a light icy-blue seasonal background with subtle watercolor texture and faint wave motifs, and overlay decorative green maple leaves for an early-summer feel. Add 5 text elements in Japanese: a blue circular badge at the upper left reading "初夏のおすすめ", a large bold brush-calligraphy headline across the top in 2 lines reading "とり天" and "ざるうどん", a small red vertical seal near the headline reading "自慢のとり天", a tall translucent blue vertical copy block at the upper right reading "ひんやり、つるり。さっぱり、満たされる。", and a price block at the lower right reading "980円 税込" with a blue brushstroke banner below that says "大盛り無料！". Add a short 4-line Japanese body copy paragraph at the lower left describing the dish in a menu-poster style. Preserve the original meal arrangement and realistic photography, but enhance it slightly for advertising: brighter, more appetizing, crisp, and high contrast. Make the overall design look like a polished restaurant poster created from a casual food photo.
title: Turn Food Photo Into Japanese Poster
description: This prompt converts a reference meal photo into a polished Japanese restaurant advertisement poster, useful for menu promos and social media food marketing.

content: A traditional Chinese ink wash hanging-scroll painting on warm aged rice paper, vertical composition, with six large vertical columns of bold black brush-calligraphy occupying the upper and right half of the image. The calligraphy should be highly legible expressive Chinese cursive-regular script with varied ink density and natural brush taper, reading from right to left in 6 columns: "金樽清酒斗十千 玉盘珍羞直万钱", "停杯投箸不能食 拔剑四顾心茫然", "欲渡黄河冰塞川 将登太行雪满山", "闲来垂钓碧溪上 忽复乘舟梦日边", "行路难 行路难 多歧路 今安在", "长风破浪会有时 直挂云帆济沧海". Add one smaller vertical inscription on the left side reading "李白行路难" with a small red seal stamp beneath it. In the lower left foreground, depict an ancient Chinese scholar-poet in flowing white and pale gray robes with a blue sash, long black hair in a traditional topknot with loose strands and ribbon, standing on the edge of a dark rocky cliff, body angled right and head lifted upward in a contemplative, heroic pose. Below and across the lower half, paint a turbulent river or sea with white crashing waves in monochrome ink and soft gray washes; in the distance, faint misty mountains and fog dissolve into the paper. Classical literati painting style, dynamic calligraphy as the main focus, poetic and majestic mood, restrained palette of black ink, gray wash, off-white paper, and a small touch of muted blue on the robe, ample negative space, museum-quality Chinese shanshui and calligraphy fusion.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Scroll
description: A vertical ink-wash artwork combining a famous Chinese poem in six calligraphy columns with a lone scholar on a cliff, ideal for classical art, cultural posters, or elegant wall-scroll imagery.

content: A traditional Chinese ink wash hanging-scroll style painting on warm off-white rice paper, vertically composed with large black brush-calligraphy occupying the upper and right-central area and a poetic landscape illustration in the lower left and bottom. The calligraphy must be crisp, fully legible, and written in expressive semi-cursive brush script, arranged in 6 vertical columns read right to left. The exact text of the 6 columns is: “金樽清酒斗十千 玉盘珍羞直万钱”, “停杯投箸不能食 拔剑四顾心茫然”, “欲渡黄河冰塞川 将登太行雪满山”, “闲来垂钓碧溪上 忽复乘舟梦日边”, “行路难 行路难 多歧路 今安在”, “长风破浪会有时 直挂云帆济沧海”. Add a smaller vertical signature inscription to the left of the main poem reading “李白行路难”, plus 1 small red square seal beneath the inscription. In the painted scene, show 1 ancient Chinese scholar-poet in flowing pale robes with a dark topknot and trailing ribbons, standing on the edge of a rugged cliff at lower left, gazing upward and outward in contemplation. Below and across the lower half, depict a turbulent river or sea with whitecaps and foam, misty ink-wash mountains receding in the distance, sparse grasses and dark brush vegetation near the cliff edge, and soft atmospheric fog. Use monochrome black and gray ink with very restrained muted blue-gray washes in the water and robe shadows. The mood is heroic, melancholic, and literary, evoking classical Chinese shanshui painting and museum-quality calligraphy, with empty negative space preserved around the text and landscape.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Landscape
description: This prompt generates a classical Chinese ink painting with flawless poem calligraphy and a scholar in a dramatic shanshui landscape, ideal for cultural posters, scroll art, or literary-themed visuals.

content: A luxurious tourism poster for {argument name="destination" default="Malaysia"}, designed as a vertical fine-art travel advertisement on a clean ivory-white textured background with subtle embossed ornamental patterns. The composition is built around one long flowing red-and-gold batik silk ribbon that sweeps diagonally and spirals through the page, forming an elegant S-curve and visually containing a dreamlike collage of landmarks, culture, and nature. At the top left, warm golden sunrise light pours over misty tropical mountains and rainforest with a waterfall, dense palms, and a large rhinoceros hornbill perched beside hibiscus flowers and white tropical blossoms. In the upper center, a detailed Kuala Lumpur skyline rises from mist, dominated by the Petronas Twin Towers, with the KL Tower and several modern skyscrapers visible. Near the upper right floats 1 colorful traditional wau kite with floral patterns against open white space. In the middle left, include 1 grand mosque with multiple domes and minarets set among palms and haze. In the middle center-right, include the historic Sultan Abdul Samad Building with its copper domes and clocktower. In the lower middle left, include 1 elevated red-and-silver urban train crossing through the city. In the lower center, show 1 ornate Chinatown gate labeled Jalan Petaling, decorated with red lanterns and bustling pedestrians. In the lower right-middle, depict the Batu Caves area with 1 towering golden Murugan statue and 1 steep rainbow staircase climbing into limestone cliffs, surrounded by crowds. At the lower right, nestle 1 landscaped city park with a turquoise lake and fountains. Purple orchids and tropical flowers are woven into the ribbon and foreground in several places. At the very bottom right, show 1 small traditional dancer in red and gold attire twirling the trailing end of the ribbon. The collage should feel luminous, hyper-detailed, majestic, and celebratory, blending photorealistic architecture with painterly fantasy travel-poster styling, soft clouds, atmospheric haze, and glowing highlights. Add elegant poster typography in the lower left: the main headline reads {argument name="headline text" default="VISIT MALAYSIA 2026"}, a smaller location line reads {argument name="location text" default="KUALA LUMPUR"}, a blue script tourism slogan reads {argument name="tagline" default="Malaysia Truly Asia"}, and below that a small refined subheading reads {argument name="subheading" default="Where Diversity Converges\nKuala Lumpur, City of Wonders\nThe Heart of Asia"}. Use a premium color palette of gold, crimson, ivory, emerald, sky blue, and tropical greens, with polished editorial composition and high-end destination-branding aesthetics.
title: Visit Malaysia 2026 Travel Poster
description: A premium vertical tourism poster showcasing Malaysia’s landmarks, culture, and tropical beauty, ideal for destination marketing and campaign visuals.

content: A hyper-detailed French popular science magazine cover in the style of a bold mainstream newsstand publication, full-page vertical layout, dramatic glossy print design, black background with intense neon lighting and saturated red, blue, purple, green, and orange highlights. At the very top, a wide red masthead bar with the magazine title {argument name="magazine title" default="SCIENCE & VIE"} in huge white serif capital letters with subtle beveling and metallic shine; small issue details on the upper right in tiny white text. On the upper left, a bright yellow and black special tag reading {argument name="special tag" default="SPÉCIAL PHOTONIQUE"} with a red arrow motif. The main headline dominates most of the upper half in gigantic white block capitals with a red glow and slight 3D shadow: {argument name="main headline" default="LA PHOTONIQUE RÉVOLUTIONNE TOUT !"}. Beneath it, 3 short cover lines in smaller white text with selected words highlighted in yellow, discussing ultrafast light-speed chips, a French record computer called Lucy, and light trapped for millions of cycles for energy-efficient AI. Centerpiece image: a futuristic square photonic processor chip floating in space at a slight perspective tilt, extremely detailed circuitry, metallic screws at the corners, glowing traces, and a bright cyan-blue core display labeled {argument name="chip name" default="Lucy"}; the chip emits intersecting beams and flowing fiber-optic light trails in electric blue, magenta, orange, and violet that radiate outward across the page. Background behind the chip shows 2 luminous server-wall corridors, red on the left and green on the right, fading into darkness, suggesting a high-tech datacenter. At the bottom, the curved horizon of Earth from space with a soft blue atmospheric glow and scattered city lights. Add 4 side callout boxes total: 2 stacked on the left and 2 stacked on the right, each with yellow headers and white body text, using a magazine cover typography hierarchy. Left box 1 header: "EXCLUSIF", featuring Lucy as the most powerful French photonic quantum computer in the world, with several short bullet lines and a yellow emphasis on "12 qubits". Left box 2 header: "RECORD MONDIAL", about light trapped for millions of cycles in a chip, with yellow emphasis on "millions de cycles". Right box 1 header area in yellow, with a bold red percentage "+300 %" and text about the French gem Soitec rising thanks to photonic AI and saving datacenters during the energy crisis. Right box 2 header: "ENQUÊTE", about the end of power-hungry GPUs, with yellow-highlighted numeric claims such as 100 times cheaper and 1,000 times faster. Near the lower center, tiny white image-credit text. A thick black bottom banner spans the page with a red square containing a white plus symbol on the left, and a large dossier teaser in white and red text: {argument name="bottom feature text" default="DOSSIER COMPLET Photonique & IA : les 10 avancées qui vont transformer votre quotidien"}. Along the very bottom, add 3 small circular red icon blurbs with short white captions about seismic optical fibers, a new generation of LiDAR and AR, and European sovereignty in progress. Lower right corner includes a white barcode box and a short block of white text about the issue being on sale. Overall look: sensational, prestigious, futuristic, glossy, information-dense, sharp editorial typography, dramatic science-news cover, cinematic lighting, high contrast, photorealistic 3D chip illustration mixed with premium magazine graphic design.
title: Futuristic Photonics Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a dramatic French-style science magazine cover centered on a glowing photonic chip, ideal for editorial mockups, tech news covers, and speculative science publication designs.

content: Create a clean corporate Japanese web banner for an AI training service, wide horizontal format around 1200x247. Use a bright white and pale blue office aesthetic with a modern professional business look. The layout has 5 clear text/icon areas plus one human figure on the right. On the left, place a small top tagline in Japanese reading 「AIはじめてでも安心。実践で身につく。」 in medium blue-gray, aligned near the upper left with a subtle dotted accent mark to its far left. Below it, place a very large bold headline in deep blue reading 「{argument name="main headline" default="ClaudeCode研修"}" with the Latin word oversized and the Japanese word continuing on the same line. content: A dramatic anime action illustration inside a traditional wooden martial arts hall, captured at a low angle with intense cinematic perspective. In the foreground, a fierce young female martial artist with {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair in a messy high bun tied with red ribbons lunges forward in a deep fighting stance, one fist thrust toward the viewer. She wears a white Chinese-style kung fu top with red trim and tassel frog closures, wide red pants, and black martial arts shoes with red accents. Her expression is focused, aggressive, and determined, with sharp red-tinted eyes. Red energy ribbons and paint-like light trails spiral around her body and punch, scattering sparks and embers. In the upper right, a second young female fighter leaps through the air, partially turned sideways, wearing a dark green qipao-inspired combat dress with ornate gold embroidery, black stockings, and heeled shoes. Her {argument name="second character hair color" default="lavender"} hair is styled in two buns with loose curls and decorative hair ornaments. She casts a martial arts gesture with one hand extended, surrounded by a sweeping arc of luminous blue water-like energy that curves around her body in a near-complete ring. The two elemental forces, red and blue, contrast sharply and imply an imminent clash. The environment is a weathered dojo interior with broken wooden floorboards exploding upward, dust, splinters, and motion debris frozen midair. Warm shafts of light stream through the wooden structure and windows, mixing with glowing particles. Large hanging calligraphy signs are visible, including a central wooden plaque reading {argument name="main sign text" default="武術会"}, with additional vertical banners bearing black Chinese characters on aged paper. Highly detailed anime illustration, dynamic foreshortening, extreme motion, layered effects, rich textures, dramatic rim lighting, fiery warm highlights against cool blue energy, polished concept art quality, vertical composition.

content: A breathtaking fantasy anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="a celestial shrine maiden"} in a snowy winter night landscape, shown in a graceful full-body dancing pose beside a reflective lake. She has extremely long, flowing {argument name="hair color" default="rose pink"} hair, partially seen from the back and side, with an elaborate gold floral hair ornament and dangling chains. Her face is mostly obscured by the angle. She wears a richly layered, ornate Japanese court kimono inspired by a jūnihitoe, with voluminous sleeves and many overlapping panels in crimson, white, purple, green, gold, and soft pink, decorated with floral brocade, embroidered blossoms, metallic trim, and shimmering patterns. Both arms are raised elegantly as she appears to guide 2 huge arcs of translucent iridescent silk or magical ribbon that spiral around her body in a luminous loop, catching rainbow highlights like soap-film aurora light. The ribbons glow with prismatic reflections and tiny sparkles, framing her against the sky. The setting is a moonlit lakeshore covered in fresh snow, with bare winter trees on the right, a small traditional pavilion or shrine structure across the water on the left, and the bright full moon high in a deep indigo sky filled with dense stars and softly falling snow. The water mirrors the moonlight and glittering particles. Emphasize cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, ultra-detailed fabric textures, dynamic flowing motion, magical sparkle effects, elegant composition, and a dreamlike celestial mood. Highly polished anime key visual, vertical composition, intricate detail, luminous highlights, no text, no watermark.

content: A screenshot-style composition of an AI image generation chat interface on a light gray app background, centered inside a rounded white panel with a soft drop shadow. Near the top is a large pale mint-green chat bubble containing a long Chinese prompt in black sans-serif text, describing a hand-drawn food map of Chengdu. Beneath it, aligned slightly left of center, is a square illustrated map image with rounded corners. The map is a whimsical hand-painted tourist food map titled in large Chinese calligraphy at the upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="成都! 吃货暴走地图"}. The subject is {argument name="city name" default="Chengdu"}, presented as a vintage hand-drawn local cuisine map with warm beige paper texture, watercolor ink outlines, and a playful artisanal travel-poster feel. The map shows simplified streets, landmarks, and district labels in Chinese, not geographically exact, but cute and decorative. Place exactly 12 featured food locations, each marked with a numbered red dot and a small Chinese label, each paired with a detailed illustrated dish. Include 12 dishes total: 1) a bowl of skewers in red chili broth, 2) a bowl of sweet water noodles, 3) rabbit head specialty, 4) guokui or stuffed baked flatbread, 5) hot pot, 6) maocai, 7) dan dan noodles, 8) hongyou chaoshou or chili oil wontons, 9) bobo chicken, 10) fuqi feipian, 11) a spicy stir-fried dish, 12) another classic Chengdu snack platter. Add a few Chengdu landmarks sketched in miniature around the roads, including a pagoda-like tower, traditional gate architecture, modern city buildings, and a central emblematic structure. Frame the entire map with a decorative border made of red chili peppers, green vines, and small leaves. Use a warm color palette dominated by chili red, mustard yellow, olive green, tea brown, and muted jade. In the lower right corner of the map, include a small legend box labeled {argument name="legend title" default="图例说明"} with 4 legend items, each with a tiny icon and Chinese text, plus a compass rose with N, E, S, W. Add many handwritten-style Chinese road names and annotations throughout. Outside the image, the interface includes small gray action icons beneath the green chat bubble on the right, a page indicator reading 2/2, an Edit pill button overlapping the lower left of the map image, a circular download/share button at the lower right of the image, and a sparse bottom toolbar with 4 small reaction/action icons. Overall look: clean modern chat UI presenting a generated square illustration, with the map as the visual focus.
title: Chengdu Hand-Drawn Food Map UI
description: This prompt generates a screenshot-like AI chat interface showcasing a whimsical illustrated Chengdu food map, useful for recreating social media demos of gpt-image-2 outputs.

content: Create a cinematic Japanese naval comparison poster in a highly detailed, photorealistic concept-art style with a warm amber sunset palette, dramatic clouds, glowing backlight, and a premium movie-poster plus technical-reference-sheet layout. The composition is vertically stacked in 2 main zones. In the top hero zone, show 2 large semi-transparent officer portraits facing inward, one on the left in an older imperial-era naval uniform and one on the right in a modern maritime self-defense force style dress uniform, both wearing peaked caps and formal dark coats, with a blazing sunset sky behind them. Centered between them, place a large serif English title reading {argument name="headline text" default="Fog of Two Eras"}, with a smaller Japanese subtitle beneath it reading ふたつの時代の霧, and 2 lines of Japanese tagline text above the title. Below the title, on the ocean at golden hour, show 2 warships moving forward on slightly converging paths: on the left, a massive World War II-era battleship with many large gun turrets, tower superstructure, weathered dark hull, and white bow spray; on the right, a modern gray guided-missile destroyer with hull number 115 visible on the bow, sleek radar-equipped superstructure, and foamy wake. Add exactly 4 helicopters in the sky, 2 on the left side and 2 on the right side, plus a suspension bridge and distant modern city skyline on the horizon. In the lower reference-sheet zone, split the page into 2 vertical panels, left for the historical ship and right for the modern ship, each panel styled like a parchment-toned military specification board with dark blue and dark red header bars, fine dividing lines, inset image boxes, and Japanese labels. The left panel should present exactly 1 large perspective render of the battleship, 3 orthographic ship views beneath it, 5 small labeled equipment/detail thumbnails in a row, 4 small head-and-shoulders uniform portraits, 4 full-body character turnaround views of a male naval officer, and 1 bottom scale silhouette of the ship beside a human figure with a 20m marker. The right panel should present exactly 1 large perspective render of the modern destroyer, 3 orthographic ship views beneath it, 6 small labeled equipment/detail thumbnails arranged around the ship references, 4 small head-and-shoulders uniform portraits, 4 full-body character lineup views including a central female officer in white cap and dark uniform, and 1 bottom scale silhouette of the ship beside a human figure with a 20m marker. Use visible Japanese headers and labels throughout, including a left historical title area and a right title area naming the ship as 護衛艦 あさつ (DDG-115). Make the whole image feel like a museum exhibition poster, military design sheet, and prestige historical sci-fi drama key art combined, with ultra-sharp detail, realistic metal textures, ocean reflections, aged paper panels, symmetrical balance, and polished editorial typography.
title: Two-Era Naval Comparison Poster
description: A cinematic Japanese military-style poster comparing a WWII battleship and a modern destroyer, ideal for presentation covers, history visuals, or dramatic concept key art.

content: Create a cute Japanese preschool hiragana poster in a soft watercolor storybook style on warm textured parchment paper. The composition is a vertical educational chart with a whimsical spring border of grass, flowers, mushrooms, butterflies, and tiny chicks, designed like a children's classroom learning sheet. At the top, place a wooden signboard header with colorful rounded Japanese text reading {argument name="headline text" default="うさぎのひらがな表"}, decorated with 2 white bunny mascots, one sitting on the left and one peeking from the right, plus small flowers and leaves around the sign. Below the header, arrange a clean 5-row by 8-column grid for a total of 40 square cells, each cell outlined in thin brown lines on a cream background. In every cell, place one large brightly colored hiragana character near the top and one small kawaii rabbit illustration below it, each rabbit acting out or holding an object associated with the word written underneath. Use a different cheerful color for many of the hiragana characters, including reds, oranges, yellows, greens, blues, and purples, with a hand-painted rounded font. Keep the text and illustrations exactly as follows, left to right by row: row 1 has 8 cells labeled あ, い, う, う, え, え, お, お with the words あめ, いい, いい, うさぎ, えんぴつ, えんぴつ, おやすり, おにぎり; row 2 has 8 cells labeled か, き, く, け, せ, せ, そ, そ with the words きくら, たま, サベツン, ケーキ, せんせい, そう, そう, しょうこう; row 3 has 8 cells labeled た, ち, ち, つ, て, て, と, と with the words たまご, たまご, ちびこ, つと, てんとうむし, てしなを, とうこ, ほしい; row 4 has 8 cells labeled な, に, ぬ, ふ, め, ね, の, ほ with the words まな, ひこうき, みんきう, ふたう, てつ, へびす, ようこ, ほし; row 5 has 8 cells labeled ま, み, む, る, れ, れ, ろ, ん with the words わた, まくら, みかん, むぎぎ, めがみ, もも, ろうた, ん. The bunny illustrations should be varied and adorable: examples include holding an umbrella, cuddling grapes, drawing with a pencil, eating a rice ball, sitting with cherry blossoms, standing under an umbrella, holding fruit, eating cake, dressed as a teacher, holding flowers, sleeping under a blue blanket, carrying eggs, hugging a tomato, holding strawberries, blowing bubbles, wearing a blue cap, holding an orange, sitting with cotton, bathing in a wooden tub, and holding candy. Maintain a gentle pastel palette, soft shading, round faces, rosy cheeks, and subtle ink outlines. The overall feeling should be nostalgic, charming, educational, highly detailed, and perfect for a nursery wall chart or a cute slide cover for a Japanese learning presentation.
title: Cute Bunny Hiragana Poster
description: A whimsical Japanese hiragana learning chart with 40 bunny-illustrated cells, ideal for classroom decor, children's materials, or playful presentation covers.

content:
Create a dramatic Japanese mobile game advertisement poster for a zombie survival RPG in anime-meets-cinematic style. Vertical smartphone poster layout, dense promotional design, gritty urban apocalypse background at dusk with ruined city streets, smoke, sparks, debris, damaged buildings, neon signs, and a crowd of zombies advancing from behind. In the center, a young anime woman sits on the ground in a slightly slouched pose, legs bent, holding a black handgun upright in one hand. She has straight dark brown to black shoulder-length hair, pale skin, and an oversized dirty white T-shirt splattered with blood. Large bold Japanese calligraphy is printed vertically on the shirt: "働きたくね〜". Her expression area is simple and unobtrusive so the composition emphasizes the shirt, weapon, and mood. Surround her with multiple zombies in torn clothing, reaching forward from the left and right background.

Use an aggressive game key-art design with 8 clearly separated promotional sections. Section 1: top-left game logo block, count 3 text elements, with large distressed English title "Dead or work", smaller Japanese subtitle "ゾンビサバイバルRPG", and heavy black paint-splatter background with white and red text. Section 2: right-side vertical slogan area, count 2 text elements, with white Japanese text "動かない、ただ" above giant red vertical text "生き残れ。" on a rough black brushstroke strip. Section 3: left-middle feature list panel, count 4 feature rows, each row with a white icon in a black square and yellow/white Japanese copy; labels are "ゾンビを倒して生き延びろ", "拠点を強化・カスタマイズ", "仲間と協力プレイ", and "デイリーミッションで報酬GET". Section 4: right-middle bonus campaign panel, count 1 headline plus 3 reward items; headline in a bright jagged yellow burst says "今すぐ始めると 豪華特典プレゼント!" and beneath it are three item boxes labeled "ゴールド ×5000", "レア武器 (7日間)", and "サバイバルキット ×10". Section 5: lower-middle gameplay screenshot strip, count 4 thumbnails with captions; captions are "リアルタイムバトル!", "基地を自由にカスタム!", "仲間とレイドボスに挑め!", and "広大なオープンワールド!". Section 6: bottom call-to-action banner, count 2 text elements, with a huge yellow-and-red Japanese phrase "今すぐダウンロード!" and smaller white/red subtext "あなたの選択が、生死を分ける。". Section 7: bottom-right store badges, count 2 badges, showing App Store and Google Play style download buttons. Section 8: bottom-right QR area, count 1 QR code in a white square.

Overall aesthetic: hyper-detailed, high-contrast, grimy, intense, commercially polished gacha/mobile game ad, combining anime character art with realistic zombie horror background. Use bold distressed typography, black brush textures, red warning colors, yellow promotional highlights, metallic UI framing, and cinematic orange-gray lighting.
title: Zombie Survival RPG Anime Ad Poster
description: This generates a dense Japanese-style mobile game advertisement poster for a zombie survival RPG, suitable for app promo art, fake game ads, or cinematic anime key visuals.

content:
Please generate a high-design character relationship map poster based on {argument name="theme" default="Demon Slayer"}. This image should not be a simple illustration, but a character relationship map that combines information visualization, narrative structure, poster design sense, and stylistic fidelity.

Please automatically complete the following:
- Identify the work and core settings corresponding to the theme
- Extract the most representative 6–12 key characters, not exceeding 15 if necessary
- Identify and display key character relationships, including blood ties, romance, friendship, alliances, hostility, master-disciple, etc.
- Automatically choose a composition method based on the work's characteristics, such as protagonist-centered, dual-core confrontation, faction-based, family tree, or chronological evolution
- Automatically refine the work's style DNA, including color, worldview symbols, textures, mood, typography, and representative elements
- Transform these stylistic elements into an overall visual design for the relationship map, rather than simply copying an official poster
- Use different colors, line types, and arrows to distinguish different relationships, ensuring clear lines and layers without clutter
- Make core characters most prominent, followed by important characters, and subordinate characters weakened to form a clear visual hierarchy
- Ensure every character name is legible, with identity or faction labels if necessary

The final product should satisfy:
- Immediate understanding of character hierarchy and key relationships
- Obvious alignment with the original work's temperament and setting
- Combines the clarity of an infographic with the premium design of a poster
- Unified, exquisite, complete, and suitable for social media sharing or poster display
- Avoids a cheap flowchart feel, messy piling, and information overload.

content:
Flat illustration, high-end oriental fantasy style city poster design, vertical 9:16 composition. The layout uses a diagonal + S-shaped flow extending from the bottom left to top right. The background is deep black grading down to intense dark red, creating strong warm-cool contrast and spatial depth with faint stardust and grain texture. In the center, a flowing golden energy line winds through like a flame, extending upward from the base, featuring fluid texture, particle effects, and gradient highlights, with subtle energy debris and volumetric light.

Within the golden flow, the architectural landmarks of {argument name="city" default="Guangzhou"} emerge layer by layer: the Canton Tower is the visual core with prominent proportions, surrounded by the Zhujiang New Town skyline, Liede Bridge, and modern Lingnan architectural elements. Buildings are rendered using "fine line drawing + golden luminous blocks," with clear outlines and rich details, appearing to float in a void against the golden halo, creating a surreal spatial hierarchy with slightly fogged backgrounds for added depth.

At the bottom of the frame is an oriental white-haired female figure with flowing hair like mist, naturally connecting and merging with the golden light. Her hair is translucent with gradient light effects; she has a graceful posture, eyes closed, and a serene expression, holding a bouquet of colorful flowers dotted with shimmering particles, symbolizing the spiritual connection between people and city energy. Character details are moderately simplified to emphasize the overall design.

Lighting is concentrated on the golden flow, buildings, and character outlines, creating intense chiaroscuro and visual focus. The overall atmosphere is grand, mysterious, imbued with oriental mythology, and slightly healing. Colors use black and dark red as a base with brilliant gold as the main visual emphasis. The gold has rich light-dark layers, complemented by small areas of high-saturation floral colors, maintaining a sophisticated and restrained aesthetic.

Integrated text and layout: Centered Songti font at the top reads "{argument name="city" default="Guangzhou"} · China," followed by smaller text "{argument name="date" default="2026/04/20"}" and "{argument name="author" default="LIYUE"}" below. Text uses pale gold or soft warm white, unified with the overall lighting. High-quality details, cinematic lighting, rich volumetric and particle details, clean image without noise, ultra-high 8K resolution, commercial-grade poster quality.

content:
GPT-Image-2 prompt: please automatically generate a top-tier concept poster / infographic-style movie poster centered around {argument name="theme" default="ranking of emperors in Chinese history"}.

Require the AI to automatically derive and uniformly design the entire following visual system based on this theme, without my extra specification:
- Core subject (automatically judge suitability for people, products, architecture, artifacts, symbols, scenes, or abstract imagery)
- Bottom supporting structure
- Hovering symbols or spiritual symbols above
- Scene wrapping elements
- Metaphor system
- Color hierarchy
- Material contrast
- Lighting logic
- Title, subtitle, and auxiliary copy
- Brand sense and high-end expression

The final frame must be: a shocking, precise, unified, cinematic, ultra-high detail conceptual key visual poster suitable for high-end printing.

[Overall Style]
Ultra-realistic 3D commercial CGI rendering, merging cinematic lighting, luxury visual language, futuristic concept design, and epic composition. The image must have a "single main visual core," not messy, not like a collage, and not like a regular e-commerce poster.

[Automatic Derivation Rules]
AI must automatically decide based on the [theme]:
1. Core visual metaphor
2. Subject type and posture
3. Form of supporting structure
4. Form of suspended elements
5. Scene shell and spatial atmosphere
6. Main, auxiliary, and emphasis colors
7. Material combinations
8. Text temperament and layout style

[Composition Rules]
- Absolute sense of premium quality
- Strong central order, overall unity
- Allows for axial symmetry or epic composition near the central axis
- Clear visual gravity, forming clear levels from top to bottom
- Edge negative space is clean, restrained, and has room to breathe

[Visual Quality]
- Ultra-high detail
- Clear volumetric light
- Authentic materials
- Natural reflection, refraction, shadows, fog, and depth of field
- Overall standard of high-end brand campaign key visual / luxury invitation poster / conceptual editorial poster

[Typography System]
- Overall 90% visual, 10% text
- AI automatically generates the most matching main title and subtitle based on the [theme]
- Title must be concise, sharp, and powerful
- Text should be as minimal and accurate as possible; do not stack words

[Signature Requirement]
Naturally add the author signature in the bottom corner: @a9quant
